package.description: Package name (e.g. express, requests, gin-gonic/gin, log4j-core)

data.name: Track DHL Shipment
data.description: Track a DHL shipment by tracking number — returns current status, delivery events timeline, origin/destination, estimated delivery date, and service type. Supports all DHL services: Express, Parcel, eCommerce, Freight. Official DHL data for 220+ countries (DHL)

tracking_number.description: DHL tracking number (e.g. "00340434292135100186" for DHL Paket, "1234567890" for DHL Express). Supports all DHL services: Express, Parcel, eCommerce, Freight

data.name: Define a Word
data.description: Get word definition — phonetic pronunciation, part of speech, definitions with examples, synonyms, antonyms, audio URL. Supports 12 languages: en, es, fr, de, it, pt, ru, ar, hi, ja, ko, zh (Free Dictionary API)

language.description: Language code: en, es, fr, de, it, pt, ru, ar, hi, ja, ko, zh (default: en)

data.name: Find Related Words
data.description: Find words by meaning, sound, rhyme, or spelling pattern. "happy" → pleased, blissful. "algorithm" rhymes → rhythm, logarithm. Great for writing, creative tasks, word games (Datamuse)

meaning.description: Find words with this meaning (e.g. "happy" → pleased, blissful, content)

sounds_like.description: Find words that sound like this (e.g. "elefant" → elephant)

rhymes_with.description: Find words that rhyme with this (e.g. "algorithm" → rhythm, logarithm)

starts_with.description: Find words starting with these letters (e.g. "algor" → algorithm, algorithmic)

data.name: Diffbot Article Extract
data.description: Extract article text, author, date, tags, sentiment, and images from any blog or news URL with multi-page support (Diffbot)

url.description: Article or blog post URL to extract text, author, and metadata

paging.description: Follow multi-page articles and concatenate text (default true)

maxTags.description: Maximum number of topic tags to return (1-50, default 10)

data.name: Diffbot Page Analyze
data.description: Auto-detect page type (product, article, image, video) and extract structured data from any URL using AI (Diffbot)

url.description: Web page URL to auto-detect type and extract structured data

mode.description: Force extraction mode instead of auto-detection

fallback.description: Fallback extraction type if auto-detection fails

data.name: Diffbot Product Extract
data.description: Extract structured product data from any e-commerce URL — title, price, brand, specs, images, reviews. Works on any retailer without custom integration (Diffbot)

url.description: Product page URL to extract data from (any e-commerce site)

discussion.description: Include product reviews and comments (default false)

data.name: Diffbot Knowledge Graph Search
data.description: Search Diffbot Knowledge Graph for products, organizations, people, and places — billions of structured entities from the web (Diffbot)

query.description: Diffbot Knowledge Graph query (DQL) — e.g. "type:Product title:iPhone"

type.description: Filter results by entity type in Knowledge Graph

size.description: Number of results to return (1-50, default 25)

data.name: Country COVID-19 Stats
data.description: Get COVID-19 statistics for a specific country by name or ISO code. Returns cases, deaths, recoveries, active, critical, per-million rates, tests, population, and flag. Covers 215+ countries and territories.

country.description: Country name, ISO2 code, or ISO3 code (e.g. "United States", "US", "USA", "Germany", "DE")

yesterday.description: Return yesterday's data instead of today's (default false)

strict.description: Use strict name matching instead of fuzzy search (default false)

data.name: Global COVID-19 Stats
data.description: Get aggregated global COVID-19 statistics: total cases (704M+), deaths, recoveries, active cases, critical cases, cases/deaths per million, tests administered, and affected countries count. Data from Worldometers and OWID.

yesterday.description: Return yesterday's data instead of today's (default false)

twoDaysAgo.description: Return data from two days ago for comparison (default false)

data.name: Historical COVID-19 Data
data.description: Get historical time-series COVID-19 data for a country or globally. Returns daily case, death, and recovery counts. Useful for trend analysis and longitudinal research. Data from Johns Hopkins CSSE.

country.description: Country name, ISO2/ISO3 code, or "all" for global aggregate (default "all")

lastdays.description: Number of most recent days to return (default 30, max ~1500 for full history)

data.name: US Influenza CDC Data
data.description: Get US influenza surveillance data from CDC FluView. Returns weekly ILI (influenza-like illness) activity levels by age group, positive test rates by influenza type (A/B), and national summary. Updated weekly.

source.description: Data source: "ilinet" for ILI network data or "usil" for US ILI summary (default "ilinet")

data.name: US County Drought Statistics
data.description: Retrieve weekly county-level drought statistics from the USDA/NOAA US Drought Monitor for a specific county or all counties in a US state. Pass a 5-digit FIPS code (e.g. "48113" for Dallas County TX, "06037" for Los Angeles County CA) to get a single county, or a 2-letter state abbreviation (e.g. "TX", "CA", "NE") to get all counties in that state. Returns drought severity by area (square miles) at each drought level (D0–D4) per week. Useful for granular agricultural impact assessment, insurance risk modeling, and local government drought planning.

aoi.description: Area of interest: either a 5-digit county FIPS code (e.g. "48113" for Dallas County TX, "06037" for Los Angeles County CA) or a 2-letter state abbreviation to get all counties in a state (e.g. "TX", "CA", "NE").

start_date.description: Start date for the query range in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. "2022-08-01"). USDM publishes weekly on Tuesdays; dates snap to the nearest release.

end_date.description: End date for the query range in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. "2022-08-14"). Maximum range is 1 year from start_date.

statistics_type.description: How drought levels are counted: "cumulative" (default) means each D-level includes worse levels; "categorical" means each level is non-overlapping and mutually exclusive.

data.name: US Drought Severity and Coverage Index
data.description: Retrieve the Drought Severity and Coverage Index (DSCI) for the US from the USDA/NOAA US Drought Monitor. DSCI is a single composite score per week ranging from 0 (no drought anywhere) to 500 (100% of the area in D4 Exceptional Drought), calculated as the weighted sum D0%×1 + D1%×2 + D2%×3 + D3%×4 + D4%×5. Returns DSCI values for both CONUS and the total US (including Alaska/Hawaii/territories) with a descriptive severity classification (none/low/moderate/severe/extreme/exceptional). Useful for tracking drought trends over time, comparing drought years, and integrating a single drought severity metric into dashboards or alerts.

start_date.description: Start date for the query range in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. "2024-01-01"). USDM publishes weekly on Tuesdays; dates snap to the nearest release.

end_date.description: End date for the query range in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. "2024-01-08"). Maximum range is 1 year from start_date.

data.name: US National Drought Statistics
data.description: Retrieve weekly US national drought statistics from the USDA/NOAA US Drought Monitor for a date range. Returns drought coverage by severity level (D0 Abnormally Dry through D4 Exceptional Drought) for CONUS and the total US (including Alaska/Hawaii/territories), reported as either square miles ("area") or percent of total land area ("percent"). Choose "cumulative" statistics_type to see how much area is in each level or worse (D1 includes D2+D3+D4); choose "categorical" for non-overlapping, mutually exclusive counts. Data is published weekly on Tuesdays — dates automatically snap to the nearest valid release. Maximum query window: 1 year. Useful for climate risk analysis, agricultural planning, and drought trend monitoring.

start_date.description: Start date for the query range in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. "2024-01-01"). USDM publishes weekly on Tuesdays; dates snap to the nearest release.

end_date.description: End date for the query range in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. "2024-01-08"). Maximum range is 1 year from start_date.

metric.description: Measurement unit: "area" returns drought coverage in square miles (default); "percent" returns drought coverage as a percentage of total US land area.

statistics_type.description: How drought levels are counted: "cumulative" (default) means each D-level includes worse levels (D1 includes D1+D2+D3+D4); "categorical" means each level is non-overlapping and mutually exclusive.

data.name: Counties by Weeks in Drought
data.description: Find US counties that experienced at least N weeks of drought at or above a specified drought severity level during a given time period, using data from the USDA/NOAA US Drought Monitor. Filter by state (or all states), drought level (D0–D4), minimum weeks threshold, and whether to count consecutive or total (non-consecutive) weeks. Returns a list of matching counties with their FIPS codes, state, and week counts. Useful for identifying persistent drought-affected regions, prioritizing disaster relief, analyzing multi-year drought patterns, and supporting agricultural or water resource planning.

drought_level.description: Minimum drought severity level to count: 0=D0 Abnormally Dry, 1=D1 Moderate Drought, 2=D2 Severe Drought, 3=D3 Extreme Drought, 4=D4 Exceptional Drought.

min_weeks.description: Minimum number of weeks that a county must have been at or above the drought_level threshold to be included in results (e.g. 4 for counties with at least 4 weeks of drought).

start_date.description: Start date for the analysis period in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. "2022-01-01"). Maximum range is 1 year from start_date.

end_date.description: End date for the analysis period in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. "2023-01-01"). Maximum range is 1 year from start_date.

state.description: Two-letter US state abbreviation to filter results to one state (e.g. "NE", "TX", "CA"). Leave empty to return counties from all states.

consecutive.description: If true, counts only consecutive weeks in drought; if false or omitted (default), counts all weeks (consecutive + non-consecutive) spent at or above the threshold.

data.name: Earthquake Count
data.description: Count earthquakes matching search criteria without returning full data — useful for statistics and monitoring thresholds (USGS)

starttime.description: Start date in ISO 8601 format, e.g. "2026-01-01"

endtime.description: End date in ISO 8601 format (default: now)

latitude.description: Center latitude for radius search

longitude.description: Center longitude for radius search

maxradiuskm.description: Search radius in kilometers from lat/lon center

data.name: Earthquake Real-Time Feed
data.description: Get real-time earthquake feed by magnitude threshold (significant/4.5+/2.5+/1.0+/all) and time window (hour/day/week/month) — updated every minute (USGS)

data.name: Earthquake Search
data.description: Search global earthquakes by time, location, magnitude, and depth — returns magnitude, coordinates, tsunami flags, PAGER alerts, and felt reports. 100+ years of data, updated every minute (USGS)

endtime.description: End date in ISO 8601 format (default: now)

minmagnitude.description: Minimum magnitude on Richter scale (e.g. 4.5 for significant earthquakes)

latitude.description: Center latitude for radius search (-90 to 90)

longitude.description: Center longitude for radius search (-180 to 180)

maxradiuskm.description: Search radius in kilometers from lat/lon center point (max ~20,000 km)

mindepth.description: Minimum depth in kilometers (negative = above sea level)

alertlevel.description: PAGER alert level filter: green (no damage), yellow, orange, red (significant damage/casualties)

data.name: SEC Financial Facts (XBRL)
data.description: XBRL financial facts for a US public company — revenue, net income, assets, liabilities, equity, EPS, cash, operating income. Returns last 5 reporting periods per metric with form type and date. Structured data from 10-K/10-Q filings (SEC EDGAR)

cik.description: SEC CIK number (e.g. "320193" for Apple). Returns XBRL financial facts: revenue, net income, assets, liabilities

data.name: Search SEC Companies
data.description: Search US public companies and SEC filings by name, ticker, or keyword. Returns company name, CIK number, form type, filing date. Covers all companies registered with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC EDGAR)

query.description: Company name, ticker, or keyword to search (e.g. "Apple Inc", "TSLA", "artificial intelligence")

data.name: SEC Company Filings
data.description: List recent SEC filings for a company by CIK number — 10-K (annual), 10-Q (quarterly), 8-K (events), proxy statements. Returns form type, filing date, document URL, description. Up to 1000 filings per company (SEC EDGAR)

cik.description: SEC CIK number (e.g. "320193" for Apple, "789019" for Microsoft). Find via company_search

data.name: SEC Company Financial History
data.description: Complete history of any XBRL financial concept (Revenues, NetIncomeLoss, Assets, EPS) for a company across all SEC filings. Returns up to 20 most recent values with period dates, form type, fiscal year. Free alternative to Bloomberg for historical financials.

cik.description: SEC CIK number (e.g. "320193" for Apple, "789019" for Microsoft)

tag.description: XBRL concept tag (e.g. Revenues, NetIncomeLoss, Assets, EarningsPerShareBasic)

taxonomy.description: XBRL taxonomy (default: us-gaap). Other: ifrs-full, dei, srt

data.name: SEC Cross-Company Financial Comparison
data.description: Compare a financial metric across ALL SEC-reporting companies for a period. Query Revenues for CY2023 → 2,649 companies with values. Top: Walmart $648B, UnitedHealth $371B. Free alternative to Bloomberg/FactSet. Period format: CY2023 (annual), CY2023Q4I (quarterly).

tag.description: XBRL concept tag (e.g. Revenues, NetIncomeLoss, Assets, TotalDebt)

period.description: Reporting period: CY2023 (annual), CY2023Q4I (quarterly instant), CY2023Q3 (quarterly duration)

unit.description: Unit of measure (default: USD). Other: USD/shares for EPS, shares for share counts

data.name: arXiv Search
data.description: Search 2.4M+ preprints in physics, math, CS, biology, and more — full text, authors, categories, PDF links (arXiv)

query.description: Search text for preprints (e.g. "transformer architecture", "quantum computing").

limit.description: Number of results to return (1-50). Default: 10.

data.name: College Details (Scorecard)
data.description: Get detailed data for a US college by UNITID — admissions rate, costs, student outcomes, earnings after graduation (College Scorecard)

school_id.description: College Scorecard UNITID (e.g. 166027 for MIT). Get IDs from college_search.

data.name: College Search (Scorecard)
data.description: Search US colleges and universities — admissions, tuition, enrollment, earnings, completion rates (College Scorecard)

name.description: School name to search for (e.g. "MIT", "Stanford", "Community College").

degree_type.description: Filter by predominant degree type awarded.

limit.description: Number of results to return (1-50). Default: 10.

data.name: DOI Lookup (CrossRef)
data.description: Resolve a DOI to full publication metadata — title, authors, journal, citations, funding, license (CrossRef)

data.name: Paper Details (OpenAlex)
data.description: Get full details for an academic paper by OpenAlex ID or DOI — authors, citations, abstract, references, open access links (OpenAlex)

id.description: OpenAlex work ID (e.g. "W2741809807") or DOI (e.g. "10.1038/nature12373"). Get IDs from paper_search.

data.name: Paper Search (OpenAlex)
data.description: Search 250M+ academic papers across all disciplines — citations, authors, institutions, open access status (OpenAlex)

query.description: Search text for academic papers (e.g. "machine learning", "CRISPR gene editing").

concept.description: OpenAlex concept ID filter (e.g. "C41008148" for Computer Science). Get IDs from OpenAlex concepts API.

author.description: Author name or ORCID to filter by (e.g. "Yoshua Bengio", "0000-0001-2345-6789").

institution.description: Institution name or ROR ID to filter by (e.g. "MIT", "Stanford University").

year_from.description: Filter papers published from this year (inclusive).

year_to.description: Filter papers published up to this year (inclusive).

open_access_only.description: If true, only return open access papers.

limit.description: Number of results to return (1-50). Default: 10.

data.name: PubMed Search (NCBI)
data.description: Search 36M+ biomedical and life science articles — clinical trials, reviews, meta-analyses with date and type filters (PubMed/NCBI)

query.description: Search text for biomedical literature (e.g. "COVID-19 vaccine efficacy", "BRCA1 breast cancer").

date_from.description: Start date filter in YYYY/MM/DD format (e.g. "2023/01/01").

date_to.description: End date filter in YYYY/MM/DD format (e.g. "2024/12/31").

limit.description: Number of results to return (1-50). Default: 10.

data.name: US Retail Electricity (EIA)
data.description: Retail electricity sales/price/revenue by US state and sector (residential, commercial, industrial). Frequency monthly/quarterly/annual. EIA public domain, 5K req/hr

state.description: Optional 2-letter US state code (e.g. "CA", "TX", "NY"). If omitted, returns national + all states.

length.description: Number of recent observations to return (default 24, max 500).

end.description: Latest period in same format as `start`.

data.name: US Natural Gas Prices (EIA)
data.description: Natural gas residential/commercial/industrial prices by US state. EIA public domain

data.name: US Petroleum Spot Prices (EIA)
data.description: Spot prices for crude oil and petroleum products: WTI (EPCWTI), Brent (EPCBRENT), Diesel (EPD2D), Regular Gas (EPMRR). Daily/weekly/monthly/annual. EIA public domain

product.description: Petroleum product code — e.g. "EPCBRENT" (Brent), "EPCWTI" (WTI), "EPD2D" (No. 2 Diesel), "EPMRR" (Regular Gas).

data.name: EIA Total-Energy Series
data.description: Direct fetch of any EIA total-energy time-series by series ID (e.g. RNGWHHD = Henry Hub spot, ELETPUS = US electricity total). EIA public domain

series_id.description: EIA series ID for the total-energy dataset (e.g. "RNGWHHD" Henry Hub spot, "ELETPUS" total US electricity, "TETCBUS" total energy consumption).

data.name: Email Validation
data.description: Validate an email address — checks deliverability, detects disposable/spam trap/abuse/catch-all addresses, MX records, SMTP provider, domain age. 99.6% accuracy (ZeroBounce)

ip_address.description: IP address of the email owner for additional geo/fraud scoring (optional)

data.name: Verify Email Address
data.description: Verify an email address — SMTP deliverability check, DNS/MX validation, disposable email detection, catch-all server detection, free provider flag, role account flag (info@, admin@). Returns comprehensive verification result. Powered by WhoisXML API.

email.description: Email address to verify (e.g. user@example.com, test@gmail.com)

data.name: List EONET Event Categories
data.description: List all available natural event categories in the NASA EONET system with their IDs, titles, and descriptions. Returns all 13 categories: drought, dustHaze, earthquakes, floods, landslides, manmade, seaLakeIce, severeStorms, snow, tempExtremes, volcanoes, waterColor, wildfires. Use category IDs as the "category" filter in eonet.events.list and as the "category_id" parameter in eonet.events.layers. No auth required.

locale.description: Reserved for future use. Currently EONET returns English-only category names and descriptions.

data.name: Get Natural Event Detail
data.description: Retrieve the full detail record for a specific NASA EONET natural disaster event by its EONET event ID (e.g. "EONET_20606"). Returns all geometry points (coordinates, magnitude, timestamps) for the entire event lifecycle, associated categories, and primary data source URLs. Useful for tracking the full track of a hurricane, the spread of a wildfire, or the progression of a flood. Obtain EONET IDs from the eonet.events.list tool.

id.description: EONET event ID (e.g. "EONET_20606"). Obtain from the eonet.events.list tool.

data.name: List Natural Disaster Events
data.description: Retrieve natural disaster and extreme weather events tracked by NASA Earth Observatory Natural Event Tracker (EONET). Returns events with geolocation, magnitude, data sources, and category. Supports filtering by status (open=ongoing, closed=resolved), event category (wildfires, severeStorms, volcanoes, earthquakes, floods, etc.), date range, data source, bounding box, and result count. Each event includes one or more geometry points with coordinates and timestamps. Ideal for real-time situational awareness, disaster monitoring, and geospatial analysis. Data sourced from GDACS, JTWC, USGS, IRWIN, FIRMS and 10+ other agencies. No auth required.

source.description: Filter events by data source ID (e.g. "GDACS", "IRWIN", "JTWC", "PDC"). Multiple sources separated by commas.

status.description: Event status filter: "open" for ongoing events, "closed" for resolved events, "all" for both. Defaults to "open".

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return (1–1000). Defaults to 10.

days.description: Return events from the last N days (1–9999). Overrides start/end when provided.

start.description: Start date for event filter in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

end.description: End date for event filter in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

category.description: Filter by event category ID. Available categories: drought, dustHaze, earthquakes, floods, landslides, manmade, seaLakeIce, severeStorms, snow, tempExtremes, volcanoes, waterColor, wildfires.

bbox.description: Bounding box filter as comma-separated decimal degrees: "minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat" (e.g. "-180,-90,180,90" for global). Event must have at least one geometry point within the box.

data.name: Get EONET GIS Visualization Layers
data.description: Retrieve GIS web service layers available for a specific EONET event category. Returns WMTS/WMS layer configurations from NASA GIBS (Global Imagery Browse Services) that can be used to visualize satellite imagery relevant to the event type (e.g. fire radiative power for wildfires, aerosol optical depth for dust/haze, sea surface temperature for storms). Each layer includes service URL, tile matrix set, and image format for integration with mapping tools like Leaflet, OpenLayers, or QGIS. Pass a category ID from eonet.events.categories.

category_id.description: Category ID to retrieve GIS web service layers for. Available IDs: drought, dustHaze, earthquakes, floods, landslides, manmade, seaLakeIce, severeStorms, snow, tempExtremes, volcanoes, waterColor, wildfires.

data.name: EPA Toxic Release Inventory
data.description: Search EPA Toxic Release Inventory (TRI) facilities by US state or ZIP code. Returns facility name, address, county, industry sector, and closed status. 600K+ regulated facilities. Source: EPA Envirofacts (US Gov open data).

state.description: US state code (e.g. CA, TX, NY, FL)

zip_code.description: ZIP code to filter (e.g. 90001). Overrides state filter if provided.

data.name: EPA Public Water Systems
data.description: Search public water systems by US state. Returns system name, PWSID, activity status, primacy agency, EPA region, population served, and service connections. Source: EPA Safe Drinking Water Act data.

state.description: US state code (e.g. FL, CA, TX)

data.name: Cultural Heritage Object Details
data.description: Full metadata for a single cultural heritage object — title, creator, description, date, language, source, rights, high-res image URL, provider institution, landing page. Use ID from search results (Europeana)

id.description: Europeana record ID from search results (e.g. "/09102/_GNM_693983" or "09102/_GNM_693983")

data.name: Search European Cultural Heritage
data.description: Search 50M+ cultural heritage objects across 4,000 institutions in 36 European countries — paintings, photographs, books, maps, 3D objects, music, film. Multilingual (24 languages). Filter by country, media type. Returns title, creator, thumbnail, provider, year (Europeana)

query.description: Search term (e.g. "Rembrandt", "Mona Lisa", "medieval manuscript", "Art Nouveau poster")

rows.description: Number of results to return (default 12, max 100)

media.description: Only return items with media (images/video/audio) — default false

country.description: Filter by country (e.g. "Netherlands", "France", "Italy", "Germany")

data.name: Get Biomedical Article Details
data.description: Retrieve full bibliographic details for a specific biomedical article from Europe PMC by its unique identifier. Provide a PubMed ID (PMID) for journal articles in MEDLINE, a PMC ID for full-text articles in PubMed Central, or other source-specific IDs. Returns complete metadata: title, authors, journal, publication year, abstract, keywords, MeSH terms, DOI, open-access flag, PMC full-text availability, citation count, publication types, and affiliation. Use this after a search to retrieve the full record for a specific paper.

id.description: Article identifier. For PubMed articles use the numeric PMID (e.g. "33000001"). For PMC full-text articles use the PMC ID without prefix (e.g. "7520369"). For other sources use the source-specific external ID.

src.description: Source database for the article. "MED" = PubMed/MEDLINE (default, covers most biomedical literature). "PMC" = PubMed Central full-text repository. "PPR" = preprints (bioRxiv, medRxiv). "PAT" = patents. "NBK" = NCBI Bookshelf. "ETH" = EthOS theses.

data.name: Get Article Citations
data.description: Retrieve a list of articles that cite a given biomedical publication in Europe PMC. Provide the article PMID (for PubMed/MEDLINE) or other source-specific ID. Returns the total citation count and bibliographic details for each citing article (title, authors, journal, year, PMID, DOI). Paginate through all citing articles with page_size and page parameters. Useful for forward citation tracking, identifying follow-up research, measuring impact of specific papers, and discovering related work published after the original article.

id.description: Numeric PMID (for MED/PubMed) or other source-specific ID of the article whose citing papers you want to retrieve (e.g. "30449648").

src.description: Source database of the target article. "MED" = PubMed (default). "PMC" = PubMed Central full-text. Use the same src you used to find the article.

page_size.description: Number of citing articles to return per page (1–1000, default 10).

page.description: Page number for pagination when there are many citing articles (default 1).

data.name: Get Article References
data.description: Retrieve the bibliography (reference list) of a biomedical article from Europe PMC. Provide the article PMID (for PubMed/MEDLINE) or other source-specific ID. Returns the total reference count and bibliographic details for each reference (title, authors, journal abbreviation, year, PMID, DOI where available). Paginate through all references with page_size and page parameters. Useful for backward citation tracking, understanding research foundations, identifying cited authors, and building citation networks.

id.description: Numeric PMID (for MED/PubMed) or other source-specific ID of the article whose bibliography you want to retrieve (e.g. "30449648").

src.description: Source database of the target article. "MED" = PubMed (default). "PMC" = PubMed Central full-text. Use the same src you used to find the article.

page_size.description: Number of references to return per page (1–1000, default 10).

page.description: Page number for pagination when a paper has many references (default 1).

data.name: Search Biomedical Literature
data.description: Search the Europe PubMed Central (Europe PMC) database of 42M+ biomedical articles, preprints, books, and patents from PubMed/MEDLINE, PubMed Central, and bioRxiv/medRxiv. Supports rich query syntax: free-text terms, field-specific filters (TITLE:"breast cancer", AUTH:"Smith J", JOURNAL:"Nature", DISEASE:"diabetes", MH:"neoplasms" for MeSH, GRANT_AGENCY:"Wellcome Trust", OPEN_ACCESS:Y), and Boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT). Sort by relevance, date, or citation count. Returns article metadata including PMID, DOI, title, authors, journal, year, abstract (with result_type=core), open-access status, and citation count.

query.description: Europe PMC search query. Supports full-text search and field-specific syntax: TITLE:"breast cancer", AUTH:"Smith J", JOURNAL:"Nature", DISEASE:"diabetes", MH:"neoplasms" (MeSH), GRANT_AGENCY:"Wellcome Trust", OPEN_ACCESS:Y. Free-text queries search across title, abstract, and MeSH terms.

page_size.description: Number of results to return per page (1–100, default 10).

result_type.description: Detail level of results. "lite" returns basic bibliographic fields (title, authors, journal, year, DOI, PMID). "core" adds abstract, keywords, MeSH terms, affiliation, and citation count. Default: "lite".

sort.description: Sort order for results. "RELEVANCE" (default) ranks by relevance score. "DATE" returns newest first. "CITED" returns most-cited first.

data.name: EU Annual GDP Growth
data.description: Annual real GDP growth rate (chain-linked volumes, % change vs previous year) for one EU country. Eurostat dataset tec00115, CC BY 4.0

country.description: Eurostat geo code — 2-letter country (DE, FR, IT, ES, UK, PL, ...) or aggregate ("EU27_2020", "EA20"). One country per call. Default: "EU27_2020".

since.description: Earliest period to return — format depends on series frequency: "2020" (annual), "2024-01" (monthly), "2024Q1" (quarterly).

until.description: Latest period to return — same format as `since`.

data.name: EU Monthly Inflation (HICP)
data.description: Monthly HICP annual rate of change (overall index) for one EU country. Eurostat dataset prc_hicp_manr, CC BY 4.0

country.description: Eurostat geo code — 2-letter country (DE, FR, IT, ES, UK, PL, ...) or aggregate ("EU27_2020", "EA20"). One country per call. Default: "EU27_2020".

since.description: Earliest period to return — format depends on series frequency: "2020" (annual), "2024-01" (monthly), "2024Q1" (quarterly).

until.description: Latest period to return — same format as `since`.

data.name: EU Annual Population
data.description: Annual population on 1 January for one EU country. Eurostat dataset demo_gind, CC BY 4.0

country.description: Eurostat geo code — 2-letter country (DE, FR, IT, ES, UK, PL, ...) or aggregate ("EU27_2020", "EA20"). One country per call. Default: "EU27_2020".

since.description: Earliest period to return — format depends on series frequency: "2020" (annual), "2024-01" (monthly), "2024Q1" (quarterly).

until.description: Latest period to return — same format as `since`.

data.name: EU Monthly Unemployment
data.description: Monthly unemployment rate (% of active population, seasonally adjusted, total population) for one EU country (geo code) or aggregate (EU27_2020, EA20). Eurostat dataset une_rt_m, CC BY 4.0

country.description: Eurostat geo code — 2-letter country (DE, FR, IT, ES, UK, PL, ...) or aggregate ("EU27_2020", "EA20"). One country per call. Default: "EU27_2020".

since.description: Earliest period to return — format depends on series frequency: "2020" (annual), "2024-01" (monthly), "2024Q1" (quarterly).

until.description: Latest period to return — same format as `since`.

data.name: EV Charging Station Details
data.description: Get full details for a specific EV charging station by ID — address, GPS coordinates, all connectors with type/power/status, network operator, usage cost, verification date, number of charging points. Use station ID from search or nearby results (Open Charge Map)

id.description: Open Charge Map station ID — get from search or nearby results

data.name: Nearby EV Chargers
data.description: Find the nearest EV charging stations to GPS coordinates within a radius (default 5km). Returns stations sorted by distance with connector types, power levels, and availability status. Filter by minimum power kW and connector type for DC fast charging (Open Charge Map)

latitude.description: GPS latitude of your location (e.g. 40.7128)

longitude.description: GPS longitude of your location (e.g. -74.0060)

min_power_kw.description: Minimum charger power in kW (e.g. 50 for DC fast charging)

data.name: Search EV Charging Stations
data.description: Search 300K+ EV charging stations worldwide by location, country, operator, connector type, and power level. Returns station address, GPS coordinates, connectors (Type 2, CCS, CHAdeMO), power kW, operator, status. Filter by min power for fast charging. Largest open EV charging database (Open Charge Map)

country_code.description: ISO 2-letter country code to filter by (e.g. "US", "GB", "DE")

latitude.description: Latitude for location-based search (e.g. 51.5074)

longitude.description: Longitude for location-based search (e.g. -0.1278)

distance_unit.description: Distance unit: KM or Miles (default KM)

operator_id.description: Filter by charging network operator ID

min_power_kw.description: Minimum charger power in kW (e.g. 50 for fast charging)

data.name: Extract Page Content
data.description: Extract clean text content from up to 10 URLs — returns title, author, published date, full text. Use for feeding web pages into agent context (Exa)

urls.description: URLs to extract content from (1-10). Returns clean text, title, author, date.

data.name: Find Similar Pages
data.description: Find web pages semantically similar to a given URL — discover related content, competitors, alternatives without knowing what to search for. Unique capability for research agents (Exa)

url.description: Reference URL — Exa finds pages semantically similar to this one

exclude_source_domain.description: Exclude results from same domain as input URL (default true)

start_published_date.description: Only include similar pages published after this date (ISO format)

include_text.description: Include full extracted page text (default false)

data.name: Semantic Web Search
data.description: Neural/semantic web search — finds conceptually related pages, not just keyword matches. Supports category filters (company, research paper, news, people, tweet), domain filtering, date range. Returns relevance scores and highlighted excerpts (Exa)

query.description: Natural language search query — Exa finds semantically related pages, not just keyword matches

type.description: Search type: "auto" (balanced), "neural" (semantic similarity), "keyword" (traditional). Default: auto

include_domains.description: Only include results from these domains (e.g. ["arxiv.org"])

start_published_date.description: Filter: only results published after this date (ISO format, e.g. "2025-01-01")

end_published_date.description: Filter: only results published before this date

include_text.description: Include full extracted page text in results (default false — saves tokens)

data.name: Convert Currency
data.description: Convert amount between any two currencies — 160+ currencies supported. Returns conversion rate and result (ExchangeRate-API)

data.name: Latest Exchange Rates
data.description: Latest exchange rates for 160+ currencies against any base currency. Updated daily on free tier. Returns all rates in one call (ExchangeRate-API)

base.description: Base currency code (e.g. "USD", "EUR", "GBP"). Default: USD. Returns rates for 160+ currencies.

data.name: Food Nutritional Details
data.description: Complete nutritional profile for a food item by FatSecret ID — all serving sizes with calories, total/saturated/trans fat, cholesterol, sodium, potassium, carbs, fiber, sugar, protein, vitamins A/C/D, calcium, iron. 2.3M+ foods (FatSecret)

food_id.description: FatSecret food ID from search results (e.g. "33691" for chicken breast)

data.name: Search Food Nutrition
data.description: Search 2.3M+ food items by name — branded products, restaurant meals, generic foods from 190+ countries. Returns food ID, name, type, brand, and per-serving summary (calories, fat, carbs, protein). Use food_id for detailed nutritional lookup (FatSecret)

query.description: Food name to search (e.g. "chicken breast", "banana", "greek yogurt")

data.name: FCC Census Block FIPS Lookup
data.description: Look up the US Census Block FIPS code, county FIPS, and state for any US latitude/longitude coordinate using the FCC Census Block API. Returns the 15-digit Block FIPS (state + county + tract + block), bounding box, county name, and state code. Useful for determining which regulatory jurisdiction, broadband program, or census reporting area a location falls within. No API key required.

latitude.description: Latitude of the location (e.g. 38.9072).

longitude.description: Longitude of the location (e.g. -77.0369).

census_year.description: Census year for block boundaries: "2000", "2010", or "2020" (default current).

data.name: FCC Regulatory Filings Search
data.description: Search FCC regulatory filings, public comments, and orders within ECFS proceedings. Returns filer names, law firms, submission types, document links, and dates. Use to find public comments on FCC rules, industry petitions, and official orders. Filter by docket number (e.g. "17-108" for Restoring Internet Freedom, "22-461" for broadband) or browse recent filings.

docket.description: FCC docket/proceeding number to filter filings by (e.g. "17-108", "22-461", "21-93").

limit.description: Number of filings to return (default 10, max 25).

sort.description: Sort field and direction (e.g. "date_received,DESC" or "date_disseminated,ASC"). Default: newest received first.

data.name: FCC Proceeding Detail
data.description: Get full details of a specific FCC proceeding by docket number from ECFS. Returns the description, bureau, type (Rulemaking vs Docket), open/closed status, filing count, and all key dates (created, NPRM, public notice). Use after fcc.regulatory.search_proceedings to get full details of a specific docket.

docket.description: FCC docket number to look up (e.g. "17-108" for Restoring Internet Freedom, "22-461" for broadband rules).

data.name: FCC Regulatory Proceedings Search
data.description: Search FCC regulatory proceedings and rulemaking dockets from the Electronic Comment Filing System (ECFS). Returns docket numbers, descriptions, bureaus, filing counts, and dates. Use to research telecom regulatory actions on topics like net neutrality, spectrum allocation, broadband deployment, and consumer protection. Filter by bureau (WC, MB, WTB, OET) or keyword.

q.description: Free-text search query across proceeding descriptions (e.g. "net neutrality", "broadband", "spectrum").

bureau.description: FCC bureau code to filter by (e.g. "WC" Wireline, "MB" Media, "WTB" Wireless, "OET" Engineering).

limit.description: Number of proceedings to return (default 10, max 25).

sort.description: Sort field and direction (e.g. "date_proceeding_created,DESC" or "total_filing_count,DESC"). Default: newest first.

data.name: Bank Details
data.description: Get full regulatory profile for an FDIC-insured bank by certificate number. Returns address, charter class, regulator, assets, deposits, branches, established date, insurance date, and coordinates.

cert.description: FDIC certificate number uniquely identifying the institution (obtain via fdic.search)

data.name: Failed Bank List
data.description: Query the FDIC failed bank list. Returns 4,100+ historical bank failures with failure date, assets at closure, acquiring institution, and estimated loss to the Deposit Insurance Fund. Covers all failures since 1934.

limit.description: Number of results to return, max 50 (default 10)

data.name: Bank Financial Reports
data.description: Retrieve quarterly Call Report financial data for an FDIC-insured institution. Returns total assets, deposits, equity, net income, ROA, ROE, net interest margin, and efficiency ratio.

cert.description: FDIC certificate number for the institution

limit.description: Number of quarterly periods to return, max 20 (default 4)

data.name: Search FDIC Banks
data.description: Search 4,300+ FDIC-insured US financial institutions by name, city, state, or charter type. Returns bank name, FDIC certificate number, total assets, deposits, and location. Official US Government data.

name.description: Partial or full institution name to search (e.g. "Chase", "Wells Fargo")

charter_class.description: Charter type: N=national, SM=state member, NM=state nonmember, SB=savings bank, OI=OCC-supervised

active.description: Filter by active status. Default true (only active institutions)

limit.description: Number of results to return, max 50 (default 10)

data.name: FEC Candidates
data.description: Search 53K+ US federal election candidates by name/cycle/office (House/Senate/Presidential)/state/party. Returns FEC candidate ID + filing dates. FEC public disclosure

q.description: Free-text candidate name search (e.g. "Sanders", "Trump").

office.description: Office: "H" House of Representatives, "S" Senate, "P" Presidential.

data.name: FEC Committee Totals
data.description: Receipts, disbursements, and cash-on-hand for US political committees (PACs, parties, candidate committees). Filter by cycle and committee type. FEC public disclosure

committee_type.description: Committee type code: "P" Presidential, "H" House, "S" Senate, "X" Party, "Y" Party-Qualified, "N" PAC, "Q" PAC-Qualified, "O" Super PAC.

data.name: FEC Election Totals
data.description: Aggregate election totals by cycle, office, and state — total receipts, disbursements, candidate count per race. FEC public disclosure

data.name: Super PAC Independent Expenditures (FEC)
data.description: Schedule E independent expenditures — Super PAC spending supporting/opposing specific federal candidates. Filter by cycle, candidate ID, or support/oppose direction. FEC public disclosure

candidate_id.description: FEC candidate ID (from fec.candidates) — return only expenditures targeting this candidate.

support_oppose.description: "S" support / "O" oppose. If omitted, both directions returned.

data.name: Federal Register Document
data.description: Get full Federal Register document by number — title, abstract, agencies, effective date, PDF link, comment deadline (Federal Register)

data.name: Recent Federal Register
data.description: Latest documents published in the Federal Register — filter by type (rules, proposed rules, notices, presidential). No search query needed (Federal Register)

data.name: Search Federal Register
data.description: Search the US Federal Register — final rules, proposed rules, notices, executive orders. Filter by agency, type, date. 90+ years of official federal government records (Federal Register)

query.description: Search keywords in Federal Register (e.g. "executive order", "cryptocurrency regulation")

document_type.description: Type: RULE (final rule), PRORULE (proposed rule), NOTICE, PRESDOCU (presidential document/executive order)

published_after.description: Only documents published after this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

data.name: FEMA Housing Assistance
data.description: Query federal disaster housing assistance data by state and disaster number. Returns registration counts, average damage, total inspected, approved amounts by county. Useful for disaster recovery analysis and aid distribution research. Source: OpenFEMA.

state.description: US state code (e.g. TX, FL, CA)

data.name: FEMA Disaster Declarations
data.description: Search US federal disaster declarations from 1953 to present. Filter by state, incident type (Fire, Flood, Hurricane, Tornado, Earthquake), and year. Returns disaster number, title, dates, designated programs (IA, PA, HM). Source: OpenFEMA (US Gov open data).

state.description: US state code (e.g. CA, TX, FL). Omit for all states.

incident_type.description: Disaster type to filter (e.g. Fire, Flood, Hurricane)

data.name: NFIP Flood Insurance Claims
data.description: Retrieve National Flood Insurance Program (NFIP) claims by state and year. Returns flood zone, building/contents payments, insurance coverage amounts, cause of damage. Essential for flood risk assessment and insurance analysis. Source: OpenFEMA.

state.description: US state code (e.g. FL, TX, LA)

data.name: Filter Financial Instruments
data.description: Filter financial instruments by exchange code, market sector (Equity/Corp/Govt/Index/Curncy/Comdty), or security type (Common Stock/ETP/REIT/ADR). Browse instrument universe by structured criteria. Bloomberg OpenFIGI.

exchange_code.description: Exchange code (e.g. US, LN, HK, JP)

market_sector.description: Market sector (e.g. Equity, Corp, Govt, Index, Curncy, Comdty)

data.name: Map Financial Identifier to FIGI
data.description: Resolve financial instrument identifiers — ISIN, CUSIP, SEDOL, or ticker symbol to Bloomberg FIGI (ISO 18774). Returns FIGI, composite FIGI, security name, type, and exchange. 300M+ instruments across 45K+ exchanges. Use ID_ISIN, ID_CUSIP, ID_SEDOL, or TICKER as id_type.

id_type.description: Identifier type: ID_ISIN, ID_CUSIP, ID_SEDOL, TICKER, ID_BB_GLOBAL

id_value.description: Identifier value (e.g. US0378331005 for ISIN, AAPL for ticker, BBG000B9XRY4 for FIGI)

exchange_code.description: Exchange code to narrow results (e.g. US, LN, JP). Optional.

data.name: Search Financial Instruments
data.description: Search 300M+ financial instruments by company name or ticker keyword. Filter by exchange and security type. Returns Bloomberg FIGI, ticker, name, market sector. Covers equities, ETPs, bonds, derivatives globally.

query.description: Search query — company name or ticker (e.g. "Tesla", "Apple Inc", "MSFT")

exchange_code.description: Filter by exchange code (e.g. US, LN, JP)

data.name: World Bank Country Data
data.description: Get global development indicators from World Bank — GDP, population, inflation, trade, poverty for 200+ countries

country_code.description: ISO 3166 country code (e.g. "US", "DE", "CHN") or "all" for all countries.

indicator_id.description: World Bank indicator ID (e.g. "NY.GDP.MKTP.CD" for GDP, "SP.POP.TOTL" for population, "FP.CPI.TOTL.ZG" for inflation).

date_range.description: Year or year range (e.g. "2023" or "2010:2023"). Omit for all available years.

data.name: ECB Official Rates
data.description: Get official European Central Bank reference exchange rates for ~33 fiat currencies (Frankfurter/ECB)

base.description: Base currency code, uppercase (e.g. "USD", "EUR"). ~33 ECB currencies.

date.description: Historical date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit for latest ECB rates.

currencies.description: Filter to specific target currencies (e.g. ["EUR","GBP"]). Omit for all ECB currencies.

data.name: FRED Economic Indicator
data.description: Get US economic data from 816K+ FRED series — GDP, CPI, unemployment, interest rates, money supply (Federal Reserve)

series_id.description: FRED series ID (e.g. "GDP", "CPIAUCSL", "UNRATE", "DFF", "T10Y2Y"). Browse at fred.stlouisfed.org.

observation_start.description: Start date for observations in YYYY-MM-DD format.

observation_end.description: End date for observations in YYYY-MM-DD format.

limit.description: Maximum number of observations to return (default 100000).

sort_order.description: Sort order by observation date. Default "asc".

data.name: Currency Exchange Rates
data.description: Get currency exchange rates for 200+ fiat and crypto currencies with optional historical dates (fawazahmed0 CDN)

base.description: Base currency code (e.g. "usd", "eur", "btc"). Lowercase. 200+ currencies supported.

date.description: Historical date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit for latest rates.

currencies.description: Filter to specific target currencies (e.g. ["eur","gbp"]). Omit for all.

data.name: US Treasury Fiscal Data
data.description: Get US Treasury fiscal data — interest rates on federal debt, national debt, debt outstanding, gold reserves, exchange rates

endpoint.description: Treasury dataset endpoint: avg_interest_rates (interest rates on federal debt), debt_to_penny (daily national debt), debt_outstanding (debt by security type), top_federal (top federal spending), gold_reserve (US gold reserves), exchange_rates_report (Treasury exchange rates).

filter.description: Filter expression (e.g. "record_date:gte:2024-01-01,security_desc:eq:Treasury Bills"). See Treasury API docs.

page_size.description: Number of records per page (default 100, max 10000).

sort.description: Sort field with direction prefix (e.g. "-record_date" for newest first). Default: "-record_date".

data.name: IBAN Validation
data.description: Validate an IBAN number and get associated bank data — BIC/SWIFT code, bank name, city (OpenIBAN)

iban.description: IBAN to validate (e.g. "DE89370400440532013000"). Spaces are stripped automatically.

data.name: Company News
data.description: Latest news articles about a specific company — headline, source, summary, date, image. Filter by date range (Finnhub)

from.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (default: 7 days ago)

to.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format (default: today)

data.name: Company Profile
data.description: Company profile by ticker — name, exchange, industry, country, market cap, shares outstanding, IPO date, logo, website (Finnhub)

data.name: Market News
data.description: General market news — categories: general, forex, crypto, merger. Top headlines with source, summary, and images (Finnhub)

data.name: Real-Time Stock Quote
data.description: Real-time stock price quote — current price, change, percent change, day high/low, open, previous close. Supports US stocks, ETFs, and major global exchanges (Finnhub)

data.name: Detect Fires by Satellite
data.description: Active fire hotspots detected by NASA satellites (VIIRS, MODIS) — latitude, longitude, brightness, confidence, fire radiative power. Filter by bounding box and days. Near real-time updates (NASA FIRMS)

west.description: Western longitude of bounding box (e.g. -125 for California)

days.description: Number of days of data (1-5, default 1)

source.description: Satellite sensor: VIIRS_SNPP_NRT (default, highest resolution), MODIS_NRT (legacy)

data.name: Food Product by Barcode
data.description: Lookup food product by barcode (EAN/UPC) — name, brand, nutrition (calories, fat, carbs, protein per 100g), Nutri-Score, NOVA group, ingredients. 3M+ products (Open Food Facts)

barcode.description: Product barcode (EAN-13, UPC-A, etc.) e.g. "3017620422003" for Nutella

data.name: Search Food Products
data.description: Search food products by name — returns matching products with brand, barcode, Nutri-Score, image. 3M+ products worldwide (Open Food Facts)

query.description: Product name to search (e.g. "nutella", "coca cola", "organic milk")

data.name: Frankfurter — List Supported Currencies
data.description: Returns all 33 currencies supported by the Frankfurter.dev ECB exchange rate API with their full English names. Use this to discover valid currency codes before calling frankfurter.currency.latest, frankfurter.currency.historical, or frankfurter.currency.series. No parameters required. No auth; public domain ECB data.

locale.description: Reserved for future use. The API returns currency names in English regardless. Pass any value.

data.name: Frankfurter — Historical ECB Rates by Date
data.description: Retrieve ECB reference exchange rates for a specific historical date from Frankfurter.dev. Coverage starts from 1999-01-04 (Euro launch). If the requested date falls on a weekend or ECB holiday, the preceding business day is returned. Supports optional base currency, target currency filter, and amount scaling. Returns 33 major currencies: AUD, BRL, CAD, CHF, CNY, CZK, DKK, GBP, HKD, HUF, IDR, ILS, INR, ISK, JPY, KRW, MXN, MYR, NOK, NZD, PHP, PLN, RON, SEK, SGD, THB, TRY, USD, ZAR and more. No auth required; public domain ECB data.

date.description: Historical date in YYYY-MM-DD format. ECB data available from 1999-01-04. Weekends/holidays return the preceding business day.

base.description: Base currency ISO 4217 code (default: EUR). Supported: AUD,BRL,CAD,CHF,CNY,CZK,DKK,EUR,GBP,HKD,HUF,IDR,ILS,INR,ISK,JPY,KRW,MXN,MYR,NOK,NZD,PHP,PLN,RON,SEK,SGD,THB,TRY,USD,ZAR

symbols.description: Comma-separated target currency codes (e.g. USD,GBP). Omit for all 33 currencies.

data.name: Frankfurter — Latest ECB Exchange Rates
data.description: Get the latest European Central Bank (ECB) reference exchange rates from Frankfurter.dev (api.frankfurter.dev/v1). Returns rates for 33 major currencies relative to a base currency (default EUR). Rates are updated each business day at ~16:00 CET by the ECB. Supports optional base currency override, target currency filter, and amount scaling for instant conversion. No auth required; public domain ECB data. Ideal for FX dashboards, invoicing, and multi-currency apps.

base.description: Base currency ISO 4217 code to convert from (default: EUR). Supported: AUD,BRL,CAD,CHF,CNY,CZK,DKK,EUR,GBP,HKD,HUF,IDR,ILS,INR,ISK,JPY,KRW,MXN,MYR,NOK,NZD,PHP,PLN,RON,SEK,SGD,THB,TRY,USD,ZAR

symbols.description: Comma-separated target currency codes to return (e.g. USD,GBP,JPY). Omit for all 33 currencies.

amount.description: Amount to convert (default: 1.0). Returns rates scaled to this amount.

data.name: Frankfurter — ECB Rate Time Series
data.description: Fetch a time series of ECB exchange rates between two dates from Frankfurter.dev. Returns a date-keyed map of rates covering every business day in the range. Coverage starts from 1999-01-04. Omit end_date to get rates through the latest available date. Narrow results to specific currencies with the symbols parameter to reduce response size. Use for trend analysis, backtesting, historical P&L calculations, and charting FX movements. No auth required; public domain ECB data.

start_date.description: Start date of the time series in YYYY-MM-DD format. ECB data available from 1999-01-04.

end_date.description: End date of the time series in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to the latest available date.

base.description: Base currency ISO 4217 code (default: EUR). Supported: AUD,BRL,CAD,CHF,CNY,CZK,DKK,EUR,GBP,HKD,HUF,IDR,ILS,INR,ISK,JPY,KRW,MXN,MYR,NOK,NZD,PHP,PLN,RON,SEK,SGD,THB,TRY,USD,ZAR

symbols.description: Comma-separated target currency codes (e.g. USD,GBP,JPY). Omit for all 33 currencies. Use specific symbols to reduce response size.

data.name: GBIF Occurrence Count
data.description: Get total occurrence count for a species, optionally filtered by country. Useful for range size estimation, data density assessment, and conservation status analysis. Source: GBIF.

taxon_key.description: GBIF taxon key to count occurrences for

country.description: ISO country code to filter count (e.g. US, BR)

data.name: GBIF Species Occurrences
data.description: Search 2.5B+ species occurrence records by taxon, country, and year. Returns observation coordinates, date, collector institution, basis of record (specimen/observation). Filter by ISO country code. Source: GBIF (2000+ institutions, 100+ countries).

taxon_key.description: GBIF taxon key for the species to search occurrences

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. US, GB, BR, AU)

data.name: GBIF Species Details
data.description: Get full taxonomic profile for a species by GBIF taxon key. Returns classification hierarchy, vernacular (common) names, synonyms, number of descendants, and accepted name. Source: GBIF backbone taxonomy.

taxon_key.description: GBIF taxon key (numeric ID from species search results)

data.name: GBIF Species Search
data.description: Search 9M+ species in the GBIF backbone taxonomy by common or scientific name. Returns taxon key, scientific name, kingdom/phylum/class/order/family/genus, and taxonomic status. Filter by rank (SPECIES, GENUS, FAMILY). Source: Global Biodiversity Information Facility (CC0).

query.description: Species name to search — common name (e.g. "polar bear") or scientific name (e.g. "Ursus maritimus")

rank.description: Taxonomic rank filter (default: SPECIES). Use SPECIES to avoid virus/subspecies matches.

data.name: Global Disaster Alerts
data.description: Get current and recent global disaster alerts from the UN GDACS system. Returns earthquakes, tropical cyclones, floods, volcanoes, droughts, and tsunamis with color-coded severity (Green/Orange/Red), affected country, coordinates, and population impact estimates.

event_type.description: Filter by disaster type: EQ=earthquake, TC=tropical cyclone, FL=flood, VO=volcano, DR=drought, TS=tsunami

alert_level.description: Minimum alert level filter: Green (low), Orange (medium), Red (high impact)

limit.description: Number of events to return, max 50 (default 10)

data.name: Disaster Event Details
data.description: Get detailed information for a specific GDACS disaster event by ID. Returns event name, alert level with justification, affected population at each severity level, coordinates, geometry for mapping, source agency, and situation report links.

event_type.description: Event type code: EQ=earthquake, TC=tropical cyclone, FL=flood, VO=volcano, DR=drought, TS=tsunami

data.name: Historical Disasters
data.description: Query the GDACS historical disaster archive from 2000 onwards. Filter by date range, event type, country, and alert level. Returns past earthquakes, cyclones, floods, and volcanoes for disaster frequency analysis and regional risk assessment.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code (e.g. "JPN", "PHL", "USA", "IDN")

limit.description: Number of events to return, max 50 (default 10)

data.name: Search Global News
data.description: Search global news articles across 65 languages from 300K+ sources worldwide. Filter by time, language, tone. Returns title, URL, domain, country. 100% free, no auth (GDELT Project)

query.description: Search query — keywords, phrases, or boolean (e.g. "climate change", "AI regulation"). Min 3 chars.

sort.description: Sort order: DateDesc (newest), ToneDesc (most positive), HybridRel (relevance)

data.name: News Mention Timeline
data.description: Track mention volume of any topic over time — see when a keyword spikes in global news coverage. Up to 3 months of data (GDELT Project)

query.description: Query to track mention volume over time (e.g. "Bitcoin", "artificial intelligence")

data.name: Address Autocomplete (Geoapify)
data.description: Get autocomplete suggestions as you type an address or place name — for real-time search UX (Geoapify/OSM)

text.description: Partial address or place name to autocomplete (e.g. "1600 Penn", "Berlin Bran").

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to filter results (e.g. "US", "DE").

type.description: Filter by result type: city, street, amenity, or country.

data.name: Geocode Address (Geoapify)
data.description: Convert an address, place name, or landmark to geographic coordinates (lat/lon) with structured address data (Geoapify/OSM)

text.description: Address, place name, or landmark to geocode (e.g. "1600 Pennsylvania Ave, Washington DC", "Eiffel Tower").

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to filter results (e.g. "US", "DE", "FR").

type.description: Filter by result type: city, street, amenity, or country.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 1, max 5).

data.name: IP Geolocation (Geoapify)
data.description: Geolocate an IP address (IPv4/IPv6) to country, city, coordinates, and network info (Geoapify)

ip.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to geolocate (e.g. "8.8.8.8", "2001:4860:4860::8888").

data.name: Isochrone / Reachability (Geoapify)
data.description: Get reachability area (isochrone) — polygon showing how far you can travel from a point in a given time or distance (Geoapify/OSM)

lat.description: Center point latitude (e.g. 52.5200)

mode.description: Travel mode: drive, walk, or bicycle. Default: drive.

time.description: Reachability time in seconds (default 900 = 15 min, max 7200 = 2h). Mutually exclusive with distance.

distance.description: Reachability distance in meters (max 100km). Mutually exclusive with time.

data.name: Place Search (Geoapify)
data.description: Search points of interest (restaurants, pharmacies, hotels, attractions) near a location by category and radius (Geoapify/OSM)

categories.description: POI category filter (e.g. "catering.restaurant", "healthcare.pharmacy", "tourism.attraction", "accommodation.hotel"). Multiple categories separated by comma.

lat.description: Center latitude for the search area.

lon.description: Center longitude for the search area.

data.name: Reverse Geocode (Geoapify)
data.description: Convert geographic coordinates (lat/lon) to a structured address — street, city, country, postal code (Geoapify/OSM)

lat.description: Latitude of the point to reverse geocode.

lon.description: Longitude of the point to reverse geocode.

data.name: Routing / Directions (Geoapify)
data.description: Get turn-by-turn driving, walking, cycling, or transit directions between two points with distance and time (Geoapify/OSM)

mode.description: Travel mode: drive, walk, bicycle, or transit. Default: drive.

units.description: Distance units: metric (km) or imperial (miles). Default: metric.

data.name: Geocode US/Canada Address
data.description: Forward geocode a US or Canada address to coordinates — returns lat/lng, parsed address components (street, city, state, ZIP, county), accuracy type (rooftop/range/street), and data source. USPS-standardized results with Census data (Geocodio)

address.description: US or Canada address to geocode (e.g. "1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington DC", "350 5th Ave, New York, NY 10118")

data.name: Reverse Geocode (US/Canada)
data.description: Reverse geocode latitude/longitude to a US or Canada address — returns formatted address, parsed components (street, city, state, ZIP, county), accuracy type, and source. Supports multiple results ranked by proximity (Geocodio)

lat.description: Latitude (24-72 range for US/Canada, e.g. 38.8976)

data.name: GeoNames Country Info
data.description: Get structured metadata for any country or all countries from the GeoNames database. Returns country code (ISO-3166 alpha-2/alpha-3/numeric), capital, continent, official languages, population, area in km², currency code, postal code format/regex, geoname_id, and a bounding box (north/south/east/west lat-lng). Omit country to retrieve all 250 countries in a single response. Supports localized country names via lang parameter. CC BY 4.0 open data, no upstream cost.

country.description: ISO-3166 2-letter country code (e.g. "US", "DE", "JP"). Omit to retrieve all countries.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for localized country names (e.g. "en", "fr", "es")

data.name: GeoNames Place Search
data.description: Search the GeoNames geographical database for places, populated areas, mountains, rivers, and 12M+ geographical features worldwide. Filter by country (ISO-3166 2-letter code), feature class (A=administrative, P=populated place, T=mountain, H=water body, S=building/spot), and feature code (e.g. PPLC=capital, MT=mountain, STM=stream). Results include geoname_id, lat/lng, country, admin1/admin2, population, and Wikipedia link. Order by relevance (default), population, elevation, or Wikipedia linkage. Supports multilingual name lookup via lang parameter. CC BY 4.0 open data, no upstream cost.

q.description: Full-text search query across place names, alternate names, and feature codes (e.g. "Paris", "Mont Blanc")

name.description: Search by exact or partial official place name (more precise than q; e.g. "New York")

country.description: Filter results to this ISO-3166 2-letter country code (e.g. "US", "FR", "DE")

feature_class.description: GeoNames feature class: A=administrative, H=hydrographic, L=parks/area, P=populated place, R=road, S=spot/building, T=mountain/hill, U=undersea, V=vegetation

feature_code.description: GeoNames feature code for fine-grained filtering (e.g. "PPLC"=capital, "MT"=mountain, "STM"=stream)

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for localized names in the response (e.g. "en", "fr", "de")

max_rows.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 10, max 1000)

order_by.description: Sort order: "relevance" (default, best name match), "population" (largest first), "elevation" (highest first), "wikipedia" (most linked)

data.name: GeoNames Timezone Lookup
data.description: Look up the timezone for any coordinates on Earth using the GeoNames database. Returns IANA timezone ID (e.g. "America/New_York", "Europe/London"), GMT offset, DST offset, raw (winter) offset, current local time, today's sunrise and sunset times (local), and the country at those coordinates. Useful for scheduling tasks across time zones, converting UTC timestamps, or annotating location data with timezone context. CC BY 4.0 open data, no upstream cost.

latitude.description: Latitude of the location to look up (-90 to 90, e.g. 40.7128 for New York City)

longitude.description: Longitude of the location to look up (-180 to 180, e.g. -74.0060 for New York City)

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the country name in the response (e.g. "en", "de")

data.name: GeoNames Postal Code Lookup
data.description: Look up postal / ZIP codes and their place names across 100+ countries using the GeoNames database. Search by postal code (e.g. "10001" for NYC, "SW1A 1AA" for London, "75001" for Paris) or by place name. Returns matching postal codes with lat/lng, admin area names, and ISO-3166-2 subdivision codes. Use the country filter (ISO-3166 2-letter) to narrow results. Covers US, UK, Germany, France, Australia, Canada, Japan, India, Brazil, and 90+ more. CC BY 4.0 open data, no upstream cost.

postal_code.description: Postal / ZIP code to look up (e.g. "10001" for New York, "SW1A 1AA" for London)

place_name.description: Place or city name to search postal codes for (e.g. "Berlin", "Sydney"). Use with country for best results.

country.description: ISO-3166 2-letter country code to restrict the postal code search (e.g. "US", "GB", "DE")

max_rows.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 10, max 1000)

data.name: Analyze Fishing Effort
data.description: Analyze fishing effort intensity across a geographic polygon for a specified date range, aggregated by gear type (trawlers, longliners, purse seiners, squid jiggers, etc.). Returns a grid of 0.1-degree cells with fishing hours and vessel counts per month or year, drawn from Global Fishing Watch's public AIS-based fishing effort dataset covering 2012–present. Useful for marine protected area monitoring, fisheries research, and vessel traffic analysis. Define the study area with a closed polygon in [longitude, latitude] coordinates.

start_date.description: Start of the analysis period in ISO format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. "2023-01-01"). GFW data coverage starts from 2012.

end_date.description: End of the analysis period in ISO format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. "2023-06-30"). Must be after start_date; keep ranges under 12 months for manageable response sizes.

coordinates.description: Polygon boundary as an array of [longitude, latitude] pairs defining the analysis area. The polygon must be closed (first and last coordinate identical). Example: [[-10,35],[-5,35],[-5,40],[-10,40],[-10,35]] for a box in the NE Atlantic. Omit to analyze global waters.

temporal_resolution.description: Time granularity for effort aggregation. "MONTHLY" groups data by calendar month; "YEARLY" by year. Default: "MONTHLY".

data.name: Get Vessel Details
data.description: Retrieve complete identity and activity profile for a specific vessel using its Global Fishing Watch vessel UUID. Returns self-reported AIS data (name, flag, MMSI, IMO, call sign), inferred gear and ship types from neural-network analysis of movement patterns, official registry records (where available), and AIS coverage statistics (total messages, positions, active date range). Vessel UUIDs are obtained from gfw.vessel.search.

vessel_id.description: Global Fishing Watch vessel UUID as returned by gfw.vessel.search (e.g. "1f1f12b24-4dfb-e5c8-90b0-32f8e79402c1").

data.name: Get Vessel Fishing Events
data.description: Retrieve AIS-detected maritime events for a specific vessel — either fishing activity episodes or port visits. Fishing events capture when a vessel slowed and maneuvered in patterns consistent with active fishing (coordinates, duration, EEZ/RFMO/FAO area codes, distance from shore and port). Port visits capture anchorage and berthing stops (port name, flag, entry/exit times). Results are paginated; use offset for subsequent pages. Vessel UUID is obtained from gfw.vessel.search.

vessel_id.description: GFW vessel UUID as returned by gfw.vessel.search (e.g. "1f1f12b24-4dfb-e5c8-90b0-32f8e79402c1").

event_type.description: Type of maritime event to retrieve. "fishing" returns AIS-detected fishing activity events; "port_visit" returns port calls and anchorage stops. Default: "fishing".

limit.description: Number of events per page (1–50, default 10).

offset.description: Pagination offset — number of events to skip (default 0).

start_date.description: Filter events starting on or after this date in ISO format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. "2023-01-01").

end_date.description: Filter events ending on or before this date in ISO format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. "2023-12-31").

data.name: Search Fishing Vessels
data.description: Search the Global Fishing Watch database for fishing and commercial vessels by name, MMSI (9-digit AIS identifier), IMO number, or call sign. Returns vessel identities with flag state, gear types (trawlers, longliners, purse seiners, etc.), ship types, and AIS transmission date ranges. GFW tracks 60,000+ active fishing vessels using satellite AIS data covering 2012–present. Optionally filter results by flag state using ISO 3-letter country code. Use gfw.vessel.details for full registry information.

query.description: Vessel name, MMSI (9-digit AIS identifier), IMO number, or call sign to search for (e.g. "Atlantic Star", "123456789", "IMO9234567"). Partial names are supported.

limit.description: Maximum number of vessels to return (1–50, default 10).

flag.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code to filter by flag state (e.g. "CHN" for China, "USA" for United States, "PAN" for Panama).

data.name: GitHub Repository Details
data.description: Get full details of a GitHub repository — description, stars, forks, language, topics, license, last update. Public repos only (GitHub API)

data.name: Search GitHub Repositories
data.description: Search GitHub repositories by keyword, language, stars, topics. Returns name, description, stars, forks, language, license, owner. Sort by stars/forks/updated. 86K+ MCP repos, 372M+ total repos (GitHub API)

query.description: Search query (e.g. "mcp server", "react framework", "language:python stars:>1000")

sort.description: Sort by: stars (default), forks, updated, help-wanted-issues

data.name: GitHub User Profile
data.description: Get a GitHub user profile — name, bio, public repos count, followers, company, location, join date. Works for users and organizations (GitHub API)

data.name: GOV.UK Document Content
data.description: Fetch full content of a GOV.UK page by its base path — title, publication date, organisation, full HTML body (or structured fields per content type), related documents.

base_path.description: GOV.UK URL path starting with /, e.g. '/income-tax-rates' or '/government/publications/spring-statement-2026'. Get from govuk.search results.

data.name: GOV.UK Organisations Directory
data.description: List or search UK government organisations (ministerial departments, executive agencies, NDPBs, public corporations) — name, web URL, parent department, child organisations. 1100+ entries from Cabinet Office to local agencies.

page.description: Page number (1-100, default 1, 20 organisations per page).

data.name: GOV.UK Content Search
data.description: Full-text search across all 700K+ GOV.UK documents — guidance pages, news articles, statistics releases, organisation pages, ministerial pages, statutory instruments. Filter by content type, organisation, topic. Distinct from UK FSA (food ratings only) — this covers ALL government publications.

q.description: Search query (free text). Examples: 'energy bill rebate', 'visa skilled worker', 'income tax allowance 2026'.

order.description: Sort order. Default is relevance. Use '-public_timestamp' for newest first, 'public_timestamp' for oldest first.

data.name: Project Gutenberg Book Detail
data.description: Get full metadata + download URLs (EPUB, TXT, HTML, cover JPEG) for a Project Gutenberg book by numeric ID (e.g. 1342 = Pride and Prejudice). Gutendex MIT

book_id.description: Project Gutenberg book ID (e.g. 1342 for Pride and Prejudice, 11 for Alice in Wonderland).

data.name: Books by Author (Gutendex)
data.description: List all Project Gutenberg books by a specific author (search by name). Filter by language. Gutendex MIT

language.description: Optional ISO 639-1 language code to filter by language (e.g. "en").

data.name: Popular Public-Domain Books
data.description: List most-downloaded Project Gutenberg books, optionally filtered by language or topic. Gutendex MIT

language.description: Optional ISO 639-1 language code to filter (e.g. "en").

data.name: Search Project Gutenberg
data.description: Search 78K+ public-domain books on Project Gutenberg by free-text query, language (ISO 639-1), topic, or author birth year. Returns book IDs, titles, authors, languages, subjects, download counts, and EPUB/TXT/HTML/cover URLs (Gutendex MIT)

query.description: Free-text search across title, author name, and subject (e.g. "shakespeare", "moby dick").

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code or comma-separated codes to filter by language (e.g. "en", "fr,de").

author_year_start.description: Filter by author birth year — only include books from authors alive in this period start.

author_year_end.description: Filter by author birth year — only include books from authors alive up to this year.

data.name: FDA Drug Adverse Events
data.description: Search FDA FAERS database for drug adverse event reports — side effects, reactions, patient demographics (OpenFDA)

search.description: OpenFDA search query for adverse events (e.g. "patient.drug.medicinalproduct:aspirin", "patient.reaction.reactionmeddrapt:headache")

skip.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

data.name: FDA Drug Labels
data.description: Search drug labeling data — indications, dosage, warnings, interactions, contraindications (OpenFDA)

search.description: OpenFDA search query for drug labels (e.g. "openfda.brand_name:ibuprofen", "openfda.generic_name:metformin", "drug_interactions:warfarin")

skip.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

data.name: USDA Food Nutrition Details
data.description: Get detailed nutrition data for a food item — up to 150 nutrients, portions, serving sizes, ingredients (USDA)

fdc_id.description: USDA FoodData Central food ID (e.g. 171705 for chicken breast)

data.name: FDA Food Recalls
data.description: Search FDA food enforcement and recall reports — contamination, mislabeling, safety alerts (OpenFDA)

search.description: OpenFDA search query for food recalls (e.g. "reason_for_recall:salmonella", "recalling_firm:"Tyson"")

skip.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

data.name: USDA Food Search
data.description: Search 350K+ foods in the USDA FoodData Central database — nutrition facts, ingredients, branded products, and reference foods

query.description: Food search query (e.g. "chicken breast", "brown rice", "vitamin D milk")

data_type.description: USDA data type filter: "Foundation" (reference foods), "Branded" (brand-name products), "SR Legacy" (legacy reference), "all" (default)

brand_owner.description: Filter by brand owner name (e.g. "General Mills", "Tyson")

data.name: NIH Supplement Details
data.description: Get full supplement label data — ingredients, amounts per serving, daily values, target groups (NIH DSLD)

data.name: NIH Supplement Search
data.description: Search 200K+ dietary supplement labels in the NIH DSLD database — vitamins, minerals, herbal products

query.description: Supplement search query (e.g. "vitamin D", "fish oil", "probiotics")

offset.description: Result offset for pagination

data.name: Search ML Datasets
data.description: Search 200K+ datasets on HuggingFace Hub by name or keyword. Returns dataset ID, downloads, likes, tags. Covers NLP, vision, audio, tabular datasets. Sorted by downloads.

search.description: Search query — dataset name or keyword (e.g. "wikipedia", "imagenet", "squad")

data.name: ML Model Details
data.description: Get full metadata for a HuggingFace model — downloads, likes, tags, library, author, pipeline task, model card data. Use model_id from hf.models search (e.g. "meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct").

data.name: Search ML Models
data.description: Search 1M+ ML models on HuggingFace Hub by name, task (text-generation, image-classification, translation), or library (transformers, diffusers). Returns model ID, downloads, likes, pipeline tag. Sorted by downloads.

search.description: Search query — model name or keyword (e.g. "llama", "stable-diffusion", "whisper")

task.description: Filter by ML task: text-generation, image-classification, translation, text-to-image, automatic-speech-recognition, etc.

library.description: Filter by framework: transformers, diffusers, sentence-transformers, gguf, etc.

data.name: Public Holidays by Country
data.description: Public holidays for any country and year — 100+ countries, national and regional holidays. Returns date, name (local + English), type. No auth, free, open source (Nager.Date)

data.name: Next Public Holidays
data.description: Next upcoming public holidays for a country — useful for scheduling, availability checks, business day calculations. No auth (Nager.Date)

data.name: Company Email & Enrichment
data.description: Find professional email addresses and company data for any domain — organization name, industry, employee count, tech stack, social profiles, email pattern, and verified contact emails with confidence scores, positions, departments, seniority levels. 50M+ domains indexed (Hunter.io)

limit.description: Max number of emails to return (default 10, max 100)

type.description: Filter by email type: "personal" (name@domain) or "generic" (info@domain)

data.name: Hyperliquid Account
data.description: Get account summary and margin details for a user wallet on Hyperliquid

data.name: Hyperliquid Klines
data.description: Get candlestick (OHLCV) data for a perpetual pair on Hyperliquid

start_time.description: Start time in milliseconds since epoch

end_time.description: End time in milliseconds since epoch

data.name: Hyperliquid Market Data
data.description: Get market metadata and mid prices for all perpetual pairs on Hyperliquid

coin.description: Specific coin symbol (e.g. BTC, ETH). Omit for all markets.

data.name: Hyperliquid Order Book
data.description: Get L2 order book depth for a perpetual pair on Hyperliquid

n_sig_figs.description: Number of significant figures for price levels

data.name: Hyperliquid Positions
