station.description: NOAA station ID (e.g. "8518750" for The Battery NYC, "9414290" for San Francisco)

date.description: Date filter: "latest" (default, most recent reading), "today", "recent" (last 72 hours), or YYYYMMDD for specific date

datum.description: Vertical datum: MLLW (default), MSL, NAVD, MHHW, MHW, MLW, etc.

data.name: TMDB Movie Details
data.description: Get full movie details — cast, crew, trailers, ratings, streaming providers, runtime, budget, revenue (TMDB)

id.description: TMDB movie ID (e.g. 550 for Fight Club, 27205 for Inception)

data.name: TMDB Discover
data.description: Discover movies or TV shows by genre, year, rating, language, and sort order (TMDB)

type.description: Content type to discover: "movie" or "tv" (default "movie")

with_genres.description: Comma-separated genre IDs to filter (e.g. "28,12" for Action+Adventure)

primary_release_year.description: Filter by primary release year (movies only)

first_air_date_year.description: Filter by first air date year (TV only)

data.name: TMDB Person Search
data.description: Search for actors, directors, or crew by name, or get full filmography by person ID (TMDB)

query.description: Person name to search for (e.g. "Tom Hanks", "Miyazaki"). Use either query or id

id.description: TMDB person ID for detailed filmography (e.g. 31 for Tom Hanks). Use either id or query

page.description: Page number for search results (1-500, default 1)

data.name: TMDB Movie Search
data.description: Search for movies, TV shows, and people by name across 1M+ titles in 39 languages (TMDB)

query.description: Search query (movie, TV show, or person name)

include_adult.description: Include adult content in results (default false)

data.name: TMDB Similar Movies
data.description: Get movie recommendations based on a movie ID — similar genres, themes, cast (TMDB)

id.description: TMDB movie ID to get recommendations for

data.name: TMDB Trending
data.description: Get trending movies, TV shows, or people — daily or weekly (TMDB)

type.description: Content type: "movie", "tv", "person", or "all" (default "movie")

data.name: TMDB Where to Watch
data.description: Find streaming, rental, and purchase options for a movie or TV show by country (TMDB)

id.description: TMDB movie or TV show ID

type.description: Content type: "movie" or "tv" (default "movie")

data.name: List Tracked Packages
data.description: List all tracking numbers registered in your account with status summary — package status, latest event, transit days, registration time. Paginated. Filter by status: NotFound, InTransit, Delivered, Expired, Exception (17TRACK)

data.name: Register Package Tracking
data.description: ⚡ ACTION: Register a tracking number to begin monitoring shipment status. Auto-detects carrier from 3,200+ supported carriers worldwide (UPS, FedEx, DHL, USPS, China Post, Royal Mail, etc.). Must be called before tracking.status. Returns detected carrier and registration status. Consumes quota — 200 free/month (17TRACK)

tracking_number.description: Package tracking number (e.g. "1Z999AA10123456784" for UPS, "9400111899560243888780" for USPS). Carrier is auto-detected from 3,200+ supported carriers

tag.description: Optional label for this shipment (e.g. order ID, customer reference). Up to 50 characters

data.name: Get Tracking Events
data.description: Get full tracking timeline for a registered package — latest status, all carrier scan events with timestamps and locations, delivery milestones, transit days, origin/destination countries. Supports 3,200+ carriers across 220 countries. Call tracking.register first if number is not yet registered (17TRACK)

tracking_number.description: Tracking number previously registered with tracking.register. Returns full event timeline, carrier info, milestones, and delivery status

data.name: Transcription Result
data.description: Retrieve the completed transcription text, word count, confidence score, detected language, and speaker labels (if diarization was enabled). Use transcript_id from submit (AssemblyAI)

transcript_id.description: Transcript ID to get the completed transcription text for

data.name: Transcription Status
data.description: Check the status of a transcription job by transcript_id — queued, processing, completed, or error. Returns audio duration when completed (AssemblyAI)

data.name: Submit Audio Transcription
data.description: Submit an audio file URL for speech-to-text transcription. Returns a transcript_id to check status and retrieve results. Supports MP3, WAV, M4A, FLAC, OGG, WebM. 99 languages auto-detected. Optional speaker diarization (AssemblyAI)

audio_url.description: Publicly accessible URL of the audio file to transcribe (MP3, WAV, M4A, FLAC, OGG, WebM)

model.description: Speech model: "universal-2" (default, fast, 99 languages) or "universal-3-pro" (highest accuracy, promptable)

speaker_labels.description: Enable speaker diarization — detect who said what (default false)

data.name: Phone Number Lookup
data.description: Validate and look up phone number info — format validation, country, national format. Optional: carrier name, line type (mobile/landline/VoIP), caller name CNAM (Twilio)

include_carrier.description: Include carrier/line type info (costs extra credit). Returns carrier name, line type (mobile/landline/voip).

include_caller_name.description: Include caller name CNAM lookup (costs extra credit). US numbers only.

data.name: Send SMS
data.description: ⚡ ACTION: Send SMS message to any phone number worldwide. Requires a Twilio phone number as sender. Returns message SID and delivery status. $0.0083/SMS US outbound (Twilio)

to.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g. "+14155551234")

from.description: Sender phone number — must be a Twilio number you own (e.g. "+15551234567")

body.description: SMS message text (max 1600 chars, splits into multiple segments if >160)

data.name: User Followers
data.description: Get paginated follower list for a Twitter/X user. Returns follower profiles with username, display name, bio, follower count, and verified status. Supports cursor pagination.

username.description: Twitter/X username to get followers for (without @)

data.name: Search Tweets
data.description: Search Twitter/X tweets by keyword, hashtag, or advanced query. Returns tweet text, author info, engagement metrics (likes, retweets, replies, views), and timestamps. 96% cheaper than official X API. Covers recent tweets.

query.description: Search query — keywords, hashtags, or advanced operators (e.g. "AI agents", "#crypto", "from:elonmusk")

sort_order.description: Sort order: "recency" for latest first, "relevancy" for most relevant (default recency)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from previous response (for next page of results)

data.name: Trending Topics
data.description: Get current trending topics on Twitter/X. Filter by location using WOEID (Where On Earth ID). Returns trend name, search query, and rank. 1=worldwide, 23424977=US, 23424975=UK.

woeid.description: Where On Earth ID for location-specific trends (1=worldwide, 23424977=US, 23424975=UK, 23424856=Japan)

data.name: User Profile
data.description: Get a Twitter/X user profile by username. Returns display name, bio, follower/following count, tweet count, verified status, profile image, location, and account creation date.

user_id.description: Twitter/X numeric user ID as alternative to username

data.name: UK Company Details
data.description: Full details for a UK company by Companies House number — company name, type, status, SIC codes, registered address, accounts due date, confirmation statement due, charges, insolvency history (Companies House UK Gov)

company_number.description: UK Companies House number (e.g. "00048839" for Barclays, "00445790" for Tesco). Get from search results

data.name: Search UK Companies
data.description: Search the UK Companies House registry by name — returns company number, name, type (plc/ltd), status (active/dissolved), incorporation date, registered address. Covers all companies registered under the Companies Act (Companies House UK Gov)

query.description: Company name to search (e.g. "Barclays", "Tesco", "ARM Holdings")

data.name: UK FSA Food Business Details
data.description: Detailed record for one UK food premise by FSA ID — full scheme breakdown (hygiene/structural/management scores), confidence in management score, exact inspection date, local authority code, business type taxonomy.

establishment_id.description: FSA establishment ID (positive integer, obtained from establishment_search results).

data.name: UK FSA Food Business Search
data.description: Search UK food businesses by name, address, postcode, or local authority. Returns the official Food Hygiene Rating Scheme score (0-5), business type, last inspection date, and full address. Covers 500K+ premises across England, Wales, Northern Ireland (Scotland has separate FHIS — pass/improvement required).

name.description: Business name fragment to search (e.g. 'Tesco', 'Pret', 'Wagamama'). Partial match supported.

latitude.description: WGS84 latitude for location-based search (use with longitude + max_distance_miles).

longitude.description: WGS84 longitude for location-based search.

max_distance_miles.description: Search radius from lat/lon in miles (0-100, default 5).

data.name: UK FSA Local Authorities
data.description: List all UK local authorities that participate in the Food Hygiene Rating Scheme (or Scottish FHIS) — name, code, total establishments count, scheme type (FHRS=England/Wales/NI 0-5 rating, FHIS=Scotland pass/improvement).

_unused.description: Reserved for future filtering — not currently used.

data.name: UK Crimes Near Coordinate
data.description: Street-level UK crime records within 1 mile of a coordinate for a given month (England + Wales, 43 forces). Filter by crime category. Returns up to 500 records with category, location, outcome status. OGL v3.0 (commercial OK)

lat.description: Latitude (e.g. 51.5074 for central London). UK area only.

date.description: Month in YYYY-MM format (e.g. "2024-06"). Defaults to latest available month if omitted.

limit.description: Max crime records to return (default 100, max 500).

data.name: UK Police Forces
data.description: List the 43 UK police forces (id + name) for England and Wales. Used to drill down into per-force statistics. OGL v3.0

refresh.description: Set to true to bypass cache and re-fetch the list of 43 UK police forces.

data.name: UK Crime Outcomes at Location
data.description: Case outcomes (charged, acquitted, action taken, etc.) for crimes at a UK coordinate in a given month. Useful for property safety scoring. OGL v3.0

lat.description: Latitude of the location to query (e.g. 51.5074).

lng.description: Longitude of the location to query (e.g. -0.1278).

date.description: Month in YYYY-MM format. Defaults to latest available month.

limit.description: Max outcome records to return (default 100, max 500).

data.name: UK Postcode Lookup
data.description: Look up a UK postcode — returns district, region, country, ward, parish, parliamentary constituency, and lat/lon coordinates. Backed by ONS/Ordnance Survey data. Example: "SW1A 1AA" → Westminster, London (Postcodes.io)

postcode.description: UK postcode to look up (e.g. "SW1A 1AA" for Westminster, "EC2R 8AH" for City of London, "M1 1AA" for Manchester). Returns district, region, country, lat/lon, parliamentary constituency

data.name: Nearest UK Postcodes
data.description: Find nearest UK postcodes to a lat/lon coordinate — returns postcodes sorted by distance with district info. Use for reverse geocoding in the UK (Postcodes.io)

lat.description: Latitude (e.g. 51.5074 for London)

data.name: Validate UK Postcode
data.description: Check if a UK postcode is valid and exists — returns true/false. Use for form validation or data cleaning (Postcodes.io)

postcode.description: UK postcode to validate (e.g. "SW1A 1AA"). Returns true if valid format and exists

data.name: UNHCR Asylum Applications
data.description: Get UNHCR asylum application counts — number of new asylum claims filed by year and country. Data includes procedure type (G=Government, U=UNHCR), application type (N=New, A=Appeal), decision level (FI=First Instance, AR=Appeal/Review), and applicant category (P=Person). Filter by year, country of origin ISO3 (coo), or country of asylum ISO3 (coa). Covers 1951–present with totals when available. Paginated; default 10 items. UNHCR Data License — open humanitarian data, no upstream cost.

year.description: Reference year for the statistics (1951–present). Omit to return all years (paginated).

coo.description: ISO 3-letter country code for country of origin, e.g. SYR (Syria), AFG (Afghanistan), UKR (Ukraine). Omit to include all origin countries.

coa.description: ISO 3-letter country code for country of asylum, e.g. DEU (Germany), TUR (Turkey), COL (Colombia). Omit to include all asylum countries.

limit.description: Number of records to return per page (1–100, default 10).

input_schema.description: UNHCR asylum application counts — number of new applications filed, broken down by procedure type, application type, and decision level.

data.name: UNHCR Asylum Decisions
data.description: Get UNHCR asylum decision outcomes — recognized refugees, other positive decisions, rejections, and closed/withdrawn cases by year and country. Includes recognition rate context: recognized + other_positive = total granted protection. Filter by year, country of origin ISO3 (coo), or country of asylum ISO3 (coa). Covers 1951–present with aggregate totals. Paginated; default 10 items. UNHCR Data License — open humanitarian data, no upstream cost.

year.description: Reference year for the statistics (1951–present). Omit to return all years (paginated).

coo.description: ISO 3-letter country code for country of origin, e.g. SYR (Syria), AFG (Afghanistan), UKR (Ukraine). Omit to include all origin countries.

coa.description: ISO 3-letter country code for country of asylum, e.g. DEU (Germany), TUR (Turkey), COL (Colombia). Omit to include all asylum countries.

limit.description: Number of records to return per page (1–100, default 10).

input_schema.description: UNHCR asylum decision outcomes — recognized refugees, other positive decisions, rejections, and closed cases by year and country.

data.name: UNHCR Refugee & Displacement Statistics
data.description: Get UNHCR global or per-country refugee and displaced-person population statistics (1951–present). Returns refugee counts, asylum seekers, internally displaced persons (IDPs), stateless persons, other people of concern (OOC), other in need of protection (OIP), and host community (HST) figures. Filter by year (e.g. 2023), country of origin ISO3 code (e.g. SYR for Syria, AFG for Afghanistan, UKR for Ukraine), or country of asylum ISO3 (e.g. DEU, TUR, COL). Omit all filters for global aggregates across all years. Paginated; default 10 items. UNHCR Data License — open humanitarian data, no upstream cost.

year.description: Reference year for the statistics (1951–present). Omit to return all years (paginated).

coo.description: ISO 3-letter country code for country of origin, e.g. SYR (Syria), AFG (Afghanistan), UKR (Ukraine). Omit to include all origin countries.

coa.description: ISO 3-letter country code for country of asylum, e.g. DEU (Germany), TUR (Turkey), COL (Colombia). Omit to include all asylum countries.

limit.description: Number of records to return per page (1–100, default 10).

input_schema.description: UNHCR global or per-country refugee and displaced-person population statistics. Returns refugee counts, asylum seekers, IDPs, stateless persons, and host community figures by year.

data.name: UNHCR Durable Solutions Data
data.description: Get UNHCR durable solutions data — voluntary repatriation (returned refugees), resettlement, and naturalization/citizenship grants for refugees and IDPs (1951–present). Durable solutions represent the three pathways out of displacement recognized by international law. Filter by year, country of origin ISO3 (coo), or country of asylum ISO3 (coa). Includes aggregate totals when available. Paginated; default 10 items. UNHCR Data License — open humanitarian data, no upstream cost.

year.description: Reference year for the statistics (1951–present). Omit to return all years (paginated).

coo.description: ISO 3-letter country code for country of origin, e.g. SYR (Syria), AFG (Afghanistan), UKR (Ukraine). Omit to include all origin countries.

coa.description: ISO 3-letter country code for country of asylum, e.g. DEU (Germany), TUR (Turkey), COL (Colombia). Omit to include all asylum countries.

limit.description: Number of records to return per page (1–100, default 10).

input_schema.description: UNHCR durable solutions data — voluntary returns, resettlement, and naturalization by year.

data.name: UN SDG Data Query
data.description: Query UN SDG time-series indicator data by series code. Returns country-level or regional annual measurements for indicators like poverty rates, maternal mortality, CO2 emissions, literacy rates, and more. Filter by UN M49 geo area code (e.g. "356" for India, "840" for USA) and/or year range. Each record includes the geo area, year, value, source, and any disaggregation dimensions (age, sex, urbanization). Get series codes from unsdg.indicators.list; get geo area codes from unsdg.geo.countries.

series_code.description: UN SDG series code to query (e.g. "SI_POV_DAY1" for poverty rate, "SH_STA_MORT" for maternal mortality, "EN_ATM_CO2" for CO2 emissions). Obtain series codes from unsdg.indicators.list.

geo_area_code.description: UN M49 numeric geo area code to filter by country or region (e.g. "356" for India, "840" for USA, "076" for Brazil). Use unsdg.geo.countries to look up codes.

start_year.description: Filter data records starting from this year (e.g. 2010). Combined with end_year to define a time range.

end_year.description: Filter data records up to and including this year (e.g. 2023). Combined with start_year to define a time range.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return per page (1-200, default 50). Large series may have thousands of records across countries and years.

data.name: UN SDG Geo Areas
data.description: List all 460 countries, territories, and world regions available in the UN SDG database using UN M49 numeric codes. Includes individual countries (e.g. India = 356, USA = 840, Brazil = 76) as well as aggregate regions (e.g. Africa = 2, Asia = 142, Latin America = 419, Least Developed Countries = 199). Use these geo area codes with unsdg.data.query to filter data by location.

filter.description: Optional substring to filter country/region names (case-insensitive, e.g. "Africa", "Asia", "Latin"). If omitted, all 460 geo areas are returned.

data.name: UN SDG Goals
data.description: List all 17 UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) with their official titles and full descriptions. Covers the complete 2030 Agenda: No Poverty, Zero Hunger, Good Health, Quality Education, Gender Equality, Clean Water, Clean Energy, Decent Work, Industry & Innovation, Reduced Inequalities, Sustainable Cities, Responsible Consumption, Climate Action, Life Below Water, Life on Land, Peace & Justice, and Partnerships. Use goal codes (1–17) as inputs to unsdg.targets.list and unsdg.indicators.list.

locale.description: Response locale code (e.g. "en" for English, "fr" for French). Defaults to English. Currently only English is supported by the UN SDG API.

data.name: UN SDG Indicators
data.description: List UN SDG monitoring indicators with their series codes, tier classifications (Tier I = established methodology, Tier II = methodology in development, Tier III = no agreed methodology), and associated data series codes. Optionally filter by goal (1–17) or target (e.g. "3.3"). Series codes (e.g. "SI_POV_DAY1", "SH_STA_MORT") are the inputs to unsdg.data.query for fetching actual country-level time series data.

goal.description: Filter indicators by SDG goal number (e.g. "1", "3", "13"). If omitted, all 231 indicators across all 17 goals are returned.

target.description: Filter indicators by target code (e.g. "1.1", "3.3", "13.2"). Requires goal to be set for best results.

data.name: UN SDG Targets
data.description: List all 169 UN SDG targets with their official descriptions. Optionally filter by goal number (1–17) to get only the targets for that goal. Each target has a code like "1.1", "3.3", or "13.2" that identifies it uniquely. Use target codes with unsdg.indicators.list to drill into specific measurement indicators.

goal.description: Filter by SDG goal number (e.g. "1" for No Poverty, "13" for Climate Action). If omitted, all 169 targets across all 17 goals are returned.

data.name: UPC Product Lookup
data.description: Look up a product by UPC, EAN, GTIN, or ISBN barcode — returns title, brand, images, dimensions, weight, category, price range, and marketplace offers (UPCitemdb)

upc.description: UPC, EAN, GTIN, or ISBN barcode number to look up (e.g. "012345678905", "9780140449136")

data.name: UPC Product Search
data.description: Search products by name, brand, or description — returns matching items with UPC codes, images, categories, and price ranges (UPCitemdb)

query.description: Full-text search query for product name, brand, or description (e.g. "iPhone 16", "Sony headphones")

match_mode.description: Match mode: 0 = broad match (default), 1 = exact match

type.description: Search type: "product" (default), "brand", or "category"

offset.description: Pagination offset for results (default: 0)

data.name: USAJOBS Reference Code Lists
data.description: Fetch reference code lists used by USAJOBS — agency codes, pay grades, hiring paths, occupational series, security clearance levels, work schedules. Use to discover valid values for search filters.

code_list.description: Reference code list name. Options: agencysubelements (all federal agencies and sub-orgs), occupationalseries (4-digit job-family codes, e.g. 2210=IT Specialist), hiringpaths (public/veteran/student/disability/internal), securityclearances (Public Trust to TS/SCI), applicantsuppliers (hiring authority types), geoloccodes (geographic location codes), postalcodes (ZIP code lookup), cyberworkroles (NICE Cybersecurity Workforce Framework roles).

input_schema.description: Fetch reference code lists used by USAJOBS — agency codes, pay grades, hiring paths, occupational series, and more.

data.name: USAJOBS Position Detail
data.description: Get full detail for a specific federal job posting by control number (PositionID) — full description, qualifications, duties, benefits summary, application instructions, security clearance level, telework eligibility.

control_number.description: PositionID from a search result (digits-only string, e.g. "856924100"). Found in the MatchedObjectId field.

input_schema.description: Fetch full detail for a specific federal job posting by control number.

data.name: USAJOBS Federal Job Search
data.description: Search US federal civil-service job postings — by keyword, location, pay grade (GS-1 to GS-15, SES), agency, position type. Returns position title, agency, location, salary range, grade, open period, application URL. USAJOBS is the ONLY source for US federal civil-service postings, distinct from BLS, ESCO, CareerJet, Adzuna, Reed, Jooble, Arbeitnow, Remotive, and TheirStack.

keyword.description: Free-text search across job title + description. Examples: 'software engineer', 'cybersecurity analyst', 'data scientist'.

location_name.description: Location filter. City + state, ZIP, or state name. Examples: 'Washington, DC', 'San Francisco, CA', '94102'.

pay_grade_low.description: Minimum federal pay grade. Format: 'GS01'-'GS15', 'SES', or 'EX-V'. Default: any.

pay_grade_high.description: Maximum federal pay grade (same format as pay_grade_low).

organization.description: Agency code or name fragment. Examples: 'DOD' (Defense), 'VA' (Veterans Affairs), 'HHS' (Health and Human Services).

position_title.description: Strict position-title filter. Use keyword for fuzzy match.

input_schema.description: Search US federal civil-service job postings by keyword, location, pay grade, agency, or position title.

data.name: Moon Phases
data.description: Get all moon phase dates for a year — New Moon, First Quarter, Full Moon, Last Quarter with exact UTC timestamps. ~50 phases per year. Source: US Naval Observatory (canonical astronomical authority, US Gov public domain).

year.description: Year for moon phases (default: current year, e.g. 2026)

data.name: Equinoxes & Solstices
data.description: Get exact dates and UTC times for vernal equinox, summer solstice, autumnal equinox, and winter solstice for any year. Also includes Earth perihelion and aphelion dates. Source: US Naval Observatory.

year.description: Year for equinoxes and solstices (default: current year)

data.name: Sun & Moon Rise/Set Times
data.description: Get sunrise, sunset, moonrise, moonset, and transit times for any location and date. Includes civil/nautical/astronomical twilight. Used for photography golden hour, agriculture planning, outdoor events. Source: USNO.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. 2026-04-07)

latitude.description: Latitude in decimal degrees (e.g. 40.7128 for New York)

longitude.description: Longitude in decimal degrees (e.g. -74.0060 for New York)

data.name: US Properties For Sale
data.description: Search active for-sale property listings across the US — filter by city, state, ZIP, price range, bedrooms, bathrooms, sqft, property type. Returns address, price, specs, photos. Millions of MLS listings (RapidAPI / Realtor.com data)

offset.description: Pagination offset (default 0)

data.name: US Location Search
data.description: Autocomplete location search for US real estate — returns matching cities, ZIP codes, and addresses with coordinates. Use to find valid city/state codes for property searches (RapidAPI / Realtor.com data)

query.description: Location search query — city name, address, or ZIP code (e.g. "Austin TX", "90210")

data.name: US Property Details
data.description: Detailed property information by property ID — beds, baths, sqft, year built, lot size, tax assessment, HOA, days on market, photos, last sale price/date. Use for_sale search first to get property_id (RapidAPI / Realtor.com data)

property_id.description: Property ID from a for_sale search result (e.g. "2734304997")

data.name: V&A Objects by Category
data.description: Browse V&A collection objects by museum category using a thesaurus ID. Major categories: THES48982 (Ceramics, 73K+), THES48917 (Paintings, 23K+), THES48968 (Designs, 25K+), THES48966 (Drawings, 18K+), THES48903 (Prints, 15K+), THES48885 (Textiles, 7K+), THES48910 (Photographs, 4K+), THES48920 (Metalwork, 4K+). Optionally refine with a keyword query and filter to on-display objects only.

category_id.description: V&A thesaurus category ID to browse. Common categories: "THES48982" (Ceramics, 73K+ objects), "THES48917" (Paintings, 23K+), "THES48968" (Designs, 25K+), "THES48966" (Drawings, 18K+), "THES48903" (Prints, 15K+), "THES48885" (Textiles, 7K+), "THES48910" (Photographs, 4K+), "THES48920" (Metalwork, 4K+).

query.description: Optional keyword to refine results within the category.

on_display.description: When true, return only objects on display in V&A galleries.

page_size.description: Number of results per page (1-30, default 10).

data.name: V&A Objects by Maker
data.description: Search V&A collection objects created by a specific artist, designer, or maker. Returns objects with maker name, date, object type, place, thumbnail URL, and display status. Supports partial name matching. Examples: "Wedgwood" (1,300+ ceramics), "William Morris" (textiles/designs), "Constable" (paintings), "Beatrix Potter" (drawings).

maker.description: Artist or maker name to search for (e.g. "Wedgwood", "William Morris", "Constable", "Beatrix Potter"). Partial matches are supported.

object_type.description: Filter maker results by object type (e.g. "Painting", "Ceramic", "Print").

page_size.description: Number of results per page (1-30, default 10).

data.name: V&A Museum Object Details
data.description: Get full details for a specific V&A museum object by its system number (e.g. "O429002"). Returns complete record: title, summary and physical descriptions, all makers with roles, materials, techniques, categories, styles, production date range, place of origin, gallery location, IIIF image URL, and direct link to the V&A collections page.

system_number.description: V&A system number identifying the museum object (e.g. "O429002", "O64940"). Returned in search results as system_number.

data.name: V&A Collection Search
data.description: Search 1M+ objects in the Victoria and Albert Museum collection by keyword, object type, date range, and display status. Returns object type, title, maker, date, place of origin, thumbnail URL, and IIIF image base for each result. Filter by on_display=true to find objects currently on display in London. Source: V&A public API (no auth required).

query.description: Keyword search across titles, descriptions, maker names, and materials (e.g. "teapot", "William Morris", "silk embroidery"). Leave empty to browse all objects.

object_type.description: Filter by object type (e.g. "Painting", "Vase", "Tile", "Photograph", "Drawing", "Print", "Textile"). Case-sensitive; use exact V&A category names.

on_display.description: When true, return only objects currently on display in V&A galleries. When false or omitted, include objects in storage too.

page_size.description: Number of results per page (1-30, default 10).

page.description: Page number for paginating through results (default 1).

data.name: ECB Exchange Rates
data.description: Current ECB reference exchange rates for 30+ currencies (USD, GBP, JPY, CHF, etc.) plus currency metadata — symbol, decimal places, issuing countries (VATcomply / ECB)

filter.description: Optional currency code filter (e.g. "USD", "GBP"). Omit for all currencies

data.name: EU VAT Rates
data.description: Get current VAT rates for EU countries — standard rate, reduced rates, super-reduced rate, parking rate. Query one country or all 27 EU members. Sourced from EU TEDB (VATcomply)

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for specific country VAT rates (e.g. "DE", "FR", "IT"). Omit for all EU countries

data.name: Validate EU VAT Number
data.description: Validate a European VAT number via VIES — returns validity status, company name, and registered address. Supports all 27 EU member states + UK. Format: country prefix + number (e.g. DE123456789) (VATcomply, open source)

vat_number.description: EU VAT number with country prefix (e.g. "DE123456789", "FR12345678901", "GB123456789")

data.name: Decode VIN Number
data.description: Decode a 17-character VIN — make, model, year, body class, engine, fuel type, transmission, plant country. US Government open data, unlimited, no auth (NHTSA)

data.name: Vehicle Models by Make
data.description: List vehicle models for a make and/or year (e.g. Honda 2024). US Government data (NHTSA)

data.name: Walk Score & Transit Score
data.description: Walk Score (0-100), Transit Score (0-100), and Bike Score (0-100) for any US/Canada address. Measures walkability to amenities, public transit quality, and cycling infrastructure. Industry-standard walkability metric used by 30,000+ websites (Walk Score / Redfin)

address.description: Full street address, e.g. "1119 8th Avenue Seattle WA 98101"

latitude.description: Latitude of the address (-90 to 90). Use geo.geocode to get coordinates.

longitude.description: Longitude of the address (-180 to 180). Use geo.geocode to get coordinates.

data.name: Real-Time Water Data
data.description: Get real-time streamflow (ft^3/s), gage height (ft), water temperature, and conductance for a USGS monitoring site. Updated every 15 minutes. Covers rivers, streams, lakes, reservoirs across the US. Use water.sites to find site numbers (USGS)

site_no.description: USGS site number (e.g. "09380000"). Use water.sites to find site numbers first.

parameter_cd.description: Parameter code(s), comma-separated. Common: 00060=streamflow, 00065=gage height, 00010=temperature. Default: all available.

period.description: ISO 8601 duration for data window (e.g. "PT2H" for 2 hours, "P7D" for 7 days). Default: PT2H.

data.name: Search Water Monitoring Sites
data.description: Search 1.5M+ USGS water monitoring sites by US state, county FIPS, bounding box, or site number. Returns site ID, station name, coordinates, altitude, HUC watershed code. Use site numbers with water.realtime for live data (USGS)

county.description: County FIPS code, 5 digits (e.g. "06037" for Los Angeles County)

bbox.description: Bounding box: west,south,east,north in decimal degrees (e.g. "-105.5,39.5,-104.5,40.5")

site_no.description: USGS site number (e.g. "09380000" for Colorado River at Lees Ferry)

data.name: Active US Weather Alerts
data.description: Active severe weather alerts for the US — tornado warnings, flood watches, heat advisories, winter storms. Filter by state, severity, event type. US Government open data, unlimited, no auth (NWS/NOAA)

area.description: US state code (e.g. "CA", "TX", "NY") or marine zone

event.description: Event type filter (e.g. "Tornado Warning", "Flood Watch", "Heat Advisory")

data.name: Weather Alerts by State
data.description: Active weather alerts for a specific US state — all warnings, watches, and advisories. Returns event, severity, urgency, description, area, timing (NWS/NOAA)

data.name: Astronomy Data
data.description: Get sunrise, sunset, moonrise, moonset times and moon phase for any location and date. Returns moon illumination percentage and phase name (WeatherAPI.com)

q.description: Location query — city name, coordinates, or zip code

date.description: Date for astronomy data (YYYY-MM-DD, default today)

data.name: Current Weather
data.description: Get current weather conditions for any location worldwide — temperature, wind, humidity, pressure, UV index, cloud cover, feels-like temp. Accepts city name, coordinates, zip code, or airport code. 100K+ stations globally (WeatherAPI.com)

q.description: Location query — city name (e.g. "London"), coordinates ("48.8,2.35"), US zip ("10001"), UK postcode ("SW1"), IP address, or IATA airport code ("JFK")

data.name: Weather Forecast
data.description: Get 3-day weather forecast — daily min/max temperature, conditions, wind, precipitation, humidity, rain/snow chance, UV index. Accepts any location query (WeatherAPI.com)

q.description: Location query — city name, coordinates, zip code, or airport code

data.name: Location Search
data.description: Search and autocomplete location names — returns matching cities with coordinates. Type partial name (e.g. "lon" → London, "mos" → Moscow). Use result coordinates with other weather tools (WeatherAPI.com)

q.description: Search query — partial city name for autocomplete (e.g. "lon" → London, "mos" → Moscow)

data.name: Exercise Details
data.description: Get full exercise details by ID — description, primary and secondary muscles worked, required equipment (barbell/dumbbell/bodyweight/machine), and category. Use with exercise_search to build workout plans.

id.description: Exercise base ID from search results (e.g. 615 for Squats)

data.name: Exercise Search
data.description: Search 896 exercises by name — bench press, squat, deadlift, curl, etc. Returns exercise name, category (Chest/Back/Legs/Arms/Abs/Shoulders/Cardio), and ID for details lookup. Open-source fitness database (Wger, CC-BY-SA).

term.description: Exercise name to search (e.g. "bench press", "squat", "deadlift", "bicep curl")

data.name: Food Ingredient Nutrition
data.description: Search 1.28M food ingredients by name — chicken breast, rice, banana, oats. Returns calories (kcal), protein, carbs, fat, fiber, sugar, sodium per 100g. Complements USDA FDC with broader international coverage.

name.description: Food ingredient name (e.g. "chicken breast", "rice", "banana", "oats")

data.name: WHO Member Countries
data.description: List all 194 WHO member countries and territories with codes and names. Use returned country codes with who.data to filter health indicators by country.

limit.description: Number of countries to return, max 200 (default 50)

data.name: WHO Health Data
data.description: Retrieve WHO health data for a specific indicator, optionally filtered by country and year range. Returns values for up to 194 countries spanning multiple decades. Official UN member state reporting data.

indicator.description: WHO indicator code (e.g. "WHOSIS_000001" for life expectancy, "MDG_0000000001" for under-5 mortality). Get codes from who.indicators

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code (e.g. "USA", "DEU", "BRA", "JPN"). Omit for all countries

limit.description: Number of data points to return, max 100 (default 20)

data.name: WHO Health Indicators
data.description: List 1,000+ WHO Global Health Observatory indicators: life expectancy, mortality rates, disease burden, immunization, nutrition, mental health, environmental health. Returns indicator codes for use with who.data.

search.description: Keyword to filter indicators by name (e.g. "mortality", "immunization", "life expectancy", "HIV", "malaria")

limit.description: Number of indicators to return, max 100 (default 20)

data.name: Domain Availability Check
data.description: Check if a domain name is available for registration — fast DNS check or thorough DNS+WHOIS verification (WhoisXML)

domain.description: Domain name to check availability for (e.g. "example.com", "mybrand.io")

mode.description: Check mode: DNS_ONLY is fast, DNS_AND_WHOIS is more accurate (default DNS_AND_WHOIS)

data.name: DNS Record Lookup
data.description: Get DNS records for a domain — A, AAAA, MX, NS, SOA, TXT, CNAME, SRV, CAA records with TTL and raw data (WhoisXML)

domain.description: Domain name to look up DNS records for (e.g. "google.com")

record_type.description: DNS record type to query: A, AAAA, MX, NS, SOA, TXT, CNAME, SRV, CAA, or _all (default _all)

data.name: WHOIS Domain Lookup
data.description: Get WHOIS registration data for any domain — registrar, creation/expiry dates, nameservers, registrant contact, status across 374M+ domains and 7,596 TLDs (WhoisXML)

domain.description: Domain name, IPv4, IPv6, or email address for WHOIS lookup (e.g. "google.com", "8.8.8.8")

prefer_fresh.description: Get latest WHOIS record even if incomplete (default false)

include_ips.description: Include resolved IP addresses for the domain (default false)

check_availability.description: Also check domain availability status (default false)

data.name: Reverse WHOIS Search
data.description: Find all domains registered by a person, company, or email — reverse WHOIS lookup for OSINT and brand monitoring (WhoisXML)

keyword.description: Search keyword to find domains — registrant name, email, company, or address (e.g. "John Smith", "acme.com")

data.name: SSL Certificate Check
data.description: Validate SSL/TLS certificate for any domain. Returns issuer (org, CN), validity dates, subject CN, wildcard status, key size, and Subject Alternative Names (SAN) list. Useful for security audits, monitoring cert expiration, and verifying HTTPS configuration (WhoisJSON)

domain.description: Domain name to check SSL certificate (e.g. google.com, apibase.pro)

data.name: Subdomain Discovery
data.description: Discover subdomains for any domain via DNS brute-force enumeration. Returns subdomain names, DNS record types (A/CNAME/MX), resolved IPs, and active/inactive status. Useful for security reconnaissance, asset inventory, and infrastructure mapping (WhoisJSON)

domain.description: Domain name to discover subdomains (e.g. github.com, example.com)

data.name: Wikidata Entity Details
data.description: Get structured data for a Wikidata entity by ID (e.g. Q42 = Douglas Adams). Returns labels, descriptions, aliases, and up to 20 property statements. 300+ languages supported. CC-0 (Wikidata)

id.description: Wikidata entity ID (e.g. "Q42" for Douglas Adams, "Q478214" for Tesla Inc). Get IDs from wikidata.search

data.name: Search Wikidata Entities
data.description: Search 100M+ structured entities in Wikidata — people, companies, places, concepts. Returns entity ID, label, description. Use IDs with wikidata.entity for full details. CC-0 public domain (Wikidata)

query.description: Search query (e.g. "Tesla", "Barack Obama", "JavaScript", "Mount Everest")

language.description: Language code for labels (e.g. "en", "de", "fr", "ja"). Default: en

data.name: Search Development Indicators
data.description: Search 16,000+ World Bank development indicators by keyword or topic — GDP, population, poverty, education, health, environment, trade. Returns indicator ID, name, source, description, topics. Use indicator IDs with finance.country_data for time-series data (World Bank, CC BY 4.0)

data.name: Convert Time Between Timezones
data.description: Convert date/time from one timezone to another. DST-aware. 597 IANA timezones (TimeAPI.io)

datetime.description: Date and time to convert in "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss" format (e.g. "2026-03-20 12:00:00")

data.name: Current Time by Timezone
data.description: Get current date, time, and day of week for any IANA timezone. DST-aware. No auth, free, unlimited (TimeAPI.io)

data.name: List All Timezones
data.description: List all 597 IANA timezone names. Use for timezone validation and discovery (TimeAPI.io)

filter.description: Optional prefix filter for timezone names (e.g. "America", "Europe", "Asia"). Returns all 597 zones if omitted.

data.name: WoRMS Taxonomic Classification
data.description: Get the full taxonomic classification tree for a marine taxon by AphiaID. Returns the complete nested hierarchy from Superdomain/Biota down to the queried taxon — each node has AphiaID, rank, and scientific name. Ideal for building taxonomic trees, verifying rank placement, or navigating the WoRMS backbone. Source: World Register of Marine Species, CC BY 4.0.

aphia_id.description: WoRMS AphiaID of the taxon whose full classification tree you want to retrieve (e.g. 137102 for Orcinus orca).

data.name: WoRMS Species Details
data.description: Retrieve the full WoRMS Aphia record for a taxon by its AphiaID. Returns complete taxonomy (kingdom to genus), accepted name and authority, valid AphiaID for synonyms, citation string, LSID (life science identifier), habitat flags, and last-modified date. Use this to resolve synonym chains — if status is "unaccepted", valid_AphiaID points to the accepted taxon. Source: World Register of Marine Species, CC BY 4.0.

aphia_id.description: WoRMS AphiaID — the unique numeric identifier for a taxon (e.g. 137102 for Orcinus orca). Obtain via worms.species.search.

data.name: WoRMS Species Search
data.description: Search 240K+ accepted marine species by scientific or partial name in the World Register of Marine Species (WoRMS). Returns AphiaID, accepted scientific name, authority, taxonomic status, kingdom/phylum/class/order/family/genus, LSID, and habitat flags (marine/brackish/freshwater/terrestrial/extinct). Supports fuzzy matching and optional restriction to marine-only taxa. Use the AphiaID from results with worms.species.details, worms.species.classification, or worms.species.vernaculars. Source: WoRMS Editorial Board, CC BY 4.0.

name.description: Scientific or partial name to search (e.g. "Orcinus orca", "Tursiops", "Gadus morhua"). Case-insensitive.

like.description: Enable fuzzy/partial match (default true). Set false for exact scientific name match only.

marine_only.description: Restrict results to marine species only (default true). Set false to include brackish/freshwater/terrestrial.

offset.description: Pagination offset — return records starting at this position (default 1, max 50 per page).

data.name: WoRMS Vernacular Names
data.description: Retrieve all registered vernacular (common) names for a marine taxon by AphiaID across all languages. Each entry includes the common name, ISO language code, and full language name. For example, AphiaID 137102 (Orcinus orca) returns "killer whale" (English), "orca" (Spanish), "épaulard" (French), and dozens more. Useful for multilingual species identification, biodiversity apps, and natural-history content. Source: World Register of Marine Species, CC BY 4.0.

aphia_id.description: WoRMS AphiaID of the taxon whose vernacular (common) names you want — returns names across all registered languages (e.g. "killer whale" in English, "orca" in Spanish).

data.name: List WTO Trade Indicators
data.description: List all available World Trade Organization time-series indicators with metadata. Returns indicator code, name, category (TAR=tariff, ITS_M=merchandise trade, ITS_S=commercial services), subcategory, unit (e.g. percent, USD millions), frequency (annual/quarterly/monthly), year coverage (startYear–endYear), number of reporting economies covered, and estimated datapoint count. Use this tool before wto.trade.data to identify the correct indicator codes. Filter by topic_id (use wto.trade.topics to enumerate topic IDs) or by category code (TAR for tariff indicators, ITS_M for merchandise trade, ITS_S for services). Key indicators: TP_A_0010 (MFN applied tariff, all products), TP_B_0090 (bound tariff), ITS_MTV_AX (merchandise exports by product group, annual), ITS_CS_AX6 (commercial services exports by sector and partner). Returns the full catalogue of 58+ indicators maintained by the WTO Statistics Division.

topic_id.description: Filter indicators by WTO topic ID (1–N). Use wto.trade.topics to list topic IDs. Example: topic 3 = World Tariff Profiles. Omit to list all 58+ indicators.

category.description: Filter indicators by category code. Known values: "TAR" (tariff profiles), "ITS_M" (merchandise trade values/indices), "ITS_S" (commercial services trade). Omit to return all categories.

data.name: List WTO Reporting Economies
data.description: List all 288 reporting economies (countries and economic groups) recognized by the WTO time-series database, with their 3-digit numeric codes, ISO 3-letter country codes, and display names. Use these codes in wto.trade.data reporter_codes and partner_codes parameters. Includes individual WTO members (e.g. 840=USA, 156=China, 276=Germany, 392=Japan, 356=India, 036=Australia), geographic aggregates (e.g. 097=European Union, 413=LDC group), and the world total (000=World). Filter results client-side by name substring (e.g. "Africa", "European", "United") to find the relevant codes for your query. Data sourced from the WTO Statistics Division; economy composition reflects WTO membership.

filter.description: Optional case-insensitive substring to filter reporters by name (e.g. "European", "Africa", "United"). Applied client-side — returns full list if omitted (288 economies).

data.name: List WTO Data Topics
data.description: List all WTO time-series database topic categories with their numeric IDs and names. Topics group related datasets — for example: World Tariff Profiles (topic 3), I-TIP non-tariff measures (topic 1), Merchandise Trade Values (topic 7), Commercial Services Trade (topic 12). Use the topic ID in wto.trade.indicators (topic_id parameter) to filter and discover the specific indicator codes available within that data domain. Returned topics correspond to the WTO Statistics Portal database groupings maintained by the WTO Statistics Division.

locale.description: Response language. Currently only English is supported by the WTO API (lang=1). Reserved for future use; leave unset.

data.name: Query WTO Trade and Tariff Data
data.description: Retrieve official World Trade Organization time-series data for trade and tariff indicators by reporting economy and year. Covers 58 indicators across three domains: tariff profiles (MFN applied/bound tariff averages, HS-level ad valorem duties by product), merchandise trade values (exports and imports by product group, quarterly and monthly), and commercial services trade (exports and imports by sector and partner). Returns structured data rows with indicator code, reporting economy, partner economy (for bilateral flows), product/sector classification, year, value, and unit. Example queries: US MFN applied tariff in 2022 (indicator TP_A_0010, reporter 840), China merchandise exports 2018-2022 (ITS_MTV_AX, reporter 156), EU commercial services exports (ITS_CS_AX6, reporter 097). Use wto.trade.indicators to discover indicator codes with their categories, units, and year ranges. Use wto.trade.reporters to look up 3-digit economy codes. Data is updated annually/quarterly by WTO Statistics Division. Free tier: 10 req/s.

indicator_codes.description: Comma-separated WTO indicator code(s) to retrieve data for. Examples: "TP_A_0010" (MFN applied tariff, all products), "ITS_MTV_AX" (merchandise exports by product group, annual), "ITS_CS_AX6" (commercial services exports by sector). Use wto.trade.indicators to discover available codes.

reporter_codes.description: Comma-separated WTO reporter economy code(s). Use the 3-digit numeric codes from wto.trade.reporters — e.g. "840" for USA, "276" for Germany, "156" for China, "392" for Japan, "000" for World aggregate. Multiple codes accepted (e.g. "840,276,156").

years.description: Comma-separated year(s) or year-ranges to retrieve (e.g. "2022", "2020,2021,2022", "2015-2022"). Omit to get all available years for the indicator. Most tariff/trade indicators cover 2005–2024.

partner_codes.description: Comma-separated partner economy code(s) for bilateral trade data. Only applicable to indicators that have partner dimension (bilateral trade flows). Use "000" for world total. Omit for indicators without partner dimension (e.g. tariffs).

max_rows.description: Maximum number of data rows to return (1–500, default 100). Lower values are faster; raise for multi-year/multi-country queries.

data.name: Search Zenodo Communities
data.description: Search Zenodo communities — curated subject-specific collections maintained by researchers and institutions. Communities group related records by discipline, project, or institution (e.g. "astronomy", "bioinformatics", "EU Horizon projects", "CERN data"). Returns community ID, title, description, and URL. Each community has a dedicated landing page on Zenodo with all its member records. Use the community ID with the Zenodo website to browse records within a specific collection. Zenodo currently hosts 5,000+ communities covering all scientific disciplines.

query.description: Search term to filter communities by name or topic (e.g. "astronomy", "machine learning", "climate", "bioinformatics").

limit.description: Number of communities to return (default 10, max 50).

data.name: List Zenodo Record Files
data.description: List all downloadable files for a Zenodo record. Returns filename, MIME type, size in bytes, checksum (MD5), and a direct download URL for each file. Zenodo records can contain multiple files (data CSVs, code archives, supplementary PDFs, images, etc.). Use zenodo.records.search or zenodo.records.detail to find the record ID, then call this tool to get the file manifest with direct download links. All files in open-access records are freely downloadable without authentication.

record_id.description: Zenodo record ID whose files to list (numeric, e.g. 10487285). Obtain from zenodo.records.search or zenodo.records.detail.

limit.description: Maximum number of files to return (default 50, max 100).

data.name: Get Zenodo Record Details
data.description: Get full metadata for a specific Zenodo research record by its numeric record ID. Returns title, DOI, creators with affiliations and ORCID, publication date, resource type, abstract/description, keywords, license, access right, related communities, file count, download and view statistics, and a link to the Zenodo page. Use zenodo.records.search to find record IDs, or extract the ID from a DOI like "10.5281/zenodo.10487285" → ID is 10487285. To list downloadable files, follow up with zenodo.records.files.

record_id.description: Zenodo record ID (numeric, e.g. 10487285) or DOI suffix. Find IDs via zenodo.records.search or from a DOI like "10.5281/zenodo.10487285".

data.name: Search Zenodo Research Records
data.description: Search 3.5M+ open-access research outputs on Zenodo — publications, datasets, software, presentations, posters, videos, and more. Filter by type, access right (open/embargoed/restricted), and publication date range. Sort by relevance, recency, most-viewed, or most-downloaded. Each result includes DOI, title, creators, resource type, access right, keywords, view/download stats, and a direct URL. Zenodo is operated by CERN under the OpenAIRE program and hosts research from EU-funded projects, science institutions worldwide, and individual researchers. All metadata is CC0.

query.description: Free-text search query across title, description, creators, and keywords (e.g. "CRISPR gene editing", "climate change datasets", "machine learning").

type.description: Filter by record type: "publication" (papers/preprints), "dataset", "software", "presentation", "poster", "image", "video", "lesson", "physicalobject", or "other".

sort.description: Sort order: "bestmatch" (relevance), "mostrecent" (newest first), "mostviewed", or "mostdownloaded". Default: bestmatch.

access_right.description: Filter by access right: "open" (freely downloadable), "embargoed", "restricted", or "closed".

date_from.description: Filter records published on or after this date in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2023-01-01").

date_to.description: Filter records published on or before this date in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2024-12-31").

limit.description: Number of results to return per page (default 10, max 50).

page.description: Page number for pagination (default 1). Combine with limit for paging.
